absolutezero.name: AbsoluteZero
absolutezero.description: Originally designed for racers, the AbsoluteZero cooler pushes performance to the limits. This high quality component from ACOM features a new coolant cycling system to keep your ship's systems cool over everything else.
absolutezero.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：ACOM
尺寸：2
等级：B 
分类：竞赛

起初专为赛艇设计的"绝对零度"冷却器能让性能发挥到极致.这款来自舰船部件制造商 (ACOM)的高品质组件亮点是一套全新的冷却液循环系统，能让您的飞船系统散热效果胜过一切。

algid.name: Algid
algid.description: The Reclaimer is a ship renowned for its ability to work long and hard. To help support even the most arduous salvaging projects, Aegis develop the bespoke Algid cooler.
algid.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：4
等级：定制
分类：工业

回收者以其坚若磐石的工作能力而闻名。为了进行最艰难的打捞作业，圣盾专门为其开发了风寒冷却器

arctic.name: Arctic
arctic.description: Providing the kind of durability that made Aegis products a mainstay with the military, the Arctic is an economic mil-spec cooler capable of withstanding the rigors of combat without sacrificing performance.
arctic.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：圣盾动力 （Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：军用

拥有着使圣盾产品成为军品里中流砥柱的可靠性，"北极"是一款经济的军规冷却器，能在不牺牲性能的前提下经受起战斗的严酷考验。

arcticstorm.name: ArcticStorm
arcticstorm.description: If you're after a cooler that balances performance, durability and stealth, then look to the ArcticStorm. This mid-grade cooler from Lightning Power Ltd uses their centuries old technology to provide performance that can be relied upon.
arcticstorm.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：闪电之力有限公司 (Lightning Power Ltd.)
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：民用

如果您想要的是一款兼顾性能，可靠性和隐蔽性的冷却器，为何不看看北境暴风冷却器呢? 这款来自闪电之力有限公司(Lightning Power Ltd.)的中端冷却器应用了已有数百年的技术， 可提供令人信赖的性能。

aufeis.name: Aufeis
aufeis.description: Impeccable design and unmatched attention to detail from Wen/Cassel Propulsion makes the Aufeis one of the premiere civilian coolers on the market.
aufeis.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：温/卡塞尔推进 (Wen/Cassel Propulsion)
尺寸：2
等级：A
分类：民用

温/卡塞尔推进完美的设计和对细节之处无与伦比的关注，使奥菲斯成为市场上首屈一指的民用冷却器之一。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

avalanche.name: Avalanche
avalanche.description: Showcasing the best of mil-spec cooler technology, the Aegis Avalanche thermal management unit has been built from the ground up to endure the demanding needs of the battlefield.
avalanche.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：2
等级：A
分类：军用

圣盾动力雪崩 体现了最好的军用冷却器技术，其热管理单元是从零全新设计的，可以满足战场的苛刻需求。

berian.name: Berian
berian.description: The Berian delivers Wen/Cassel's signature look and performance in an introductory cooler that will meet and surpass pilot's expectations.
berian.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：温/卡塞尔推进 (Wen/Cassel Propulsion)
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：民用

布内恩所表现出的是温-卡塞公司(Wen/Cassel)标志性的外观和性能，。作为一款入门级冷却器， 它将满足并超过所有飞行员的期望。

blastchill.name: BlastChill
blastchill.description: The BlastChill is a consumer-grade cooler from Lightning Power Ltd. It keeps your ship running without straining its signature, but is best known for a much mocked 2945 ad campaign that promised it was "Built to bring the chill."
blastchill.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：闪电之力有限公司 (Lightning Power Ltd.)
尺寸：1
等级：D
分类：民用

爆寒 冷却器是闪电之力公司(Lightning Power Ltd.)的消费级产品。 它能在飞船正常工作下不会发出过强的信号，但最为大众所知的是一则备受戏谑的2945广告宣传活动，承诺它是"为带来寒冷而造"。

blizzard.name: Blizzard
blizzard.description: Navy mechanics worked with Aegis engineers to ensure the Blizzard met their specific needs. When it reached the commercial market, this top of the line, military-grade cooler became one of Aegis' top selling components.
blizzard.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：3
等级：A 
分类：军用

海军技师和圣盾工程师们的通力合作确保了"暴雪"能够满足他们的特殊需求.当它踏入一线消费市场时，这款军用级冷却器就成为了圣盾最畅销的组件之一。

boreal.name: Boreal
boreal.description: Designed to disperse the heat of battle, Aegis Dynamics' Boreal cooler is a military standard with the capacity to survive stressful situations.
boreal.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：圣盾动力 （Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：2
等级：D
分类：军用

旨在分散战斗的热量，圣盾动力的"北风"是一款能承受高压环境考验的军规级冷却器.

bracer.name: Bracer
bracer.description: For those looking for a solid, dependable mid-line cooler, you can't do much better than Aegis' Bracer. This small-frame cooler system offers solid performance and durability to keep your ship firing on all cylinders.
bracer.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：军用

对于那些正在物色坚实可靠的中端冷却器的人来说，你绝对找不到比圣盾的"寒索"更好的了. 这款小巧的冷却器系统提供了出色的性能而且耐操，保障你的飞船马力全开。

chill-max.name: Chill-Max
chill-max.description: The Chill-Max name is as straightforward as the design on this Juno Starwerk cooler. This highly-rated industrial cooler has been a favorite of haulers for centuries.
chill-max.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：3
等级：A
分类：工业

寒意满满这个名字与朱诺星际工厂(Juno Starwerk)的冷却器设计一样直截了当。 这款高度评价的工业冷却器在数百年来一直是货船的最爱。

coldsnap.name: ColdSnap
coldsnap.description: Well-balanced performance is the hallmark of the ColdSnap cooler from Lightning Power Ltd., thanks to its ability to easily process the extra heat your ship generates during your day-to-day travels.
coldsnap.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：闪电之力有限公司 (Lightning Power Ltd.)
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：民用

高度协调的性能是寒流的亮点， 归因于它有能力在您日常旅行中轻易处理飞船产生的废热。

coldsurge.name: ColdSurge
coldsurge.description: Make no mistake, the ColdSurge may not win any awards, but this large cooler from Lighting Power Ltd provides a good entry-level option for most civilian ships without breaking the bank.
coldsurge.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：闪电之力有限公司 (Lightning Power Ltd.)
尺寸：3
等级：D
分类：民用

毫无疑问，虽然寒潮几乎没有任何特别的亮点，但闪电之力公司(Lightning Power Ltd.)的这款大型冷却器却为大多数民用飞船提供了一个很好的入门级选择，不会掏空他们的腰包。

coolcore.name: CoolCore
coolcore.description: The name CoolCore says it all. Designed by Juno Starwerk to be as hardworking as you are, this cooler helps ensure that your entire ship operates well within desired temperature parameters.
coolcore.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：工业

"冷却核心"这个名字足以说明一切。朱诺星际工厂所设计的这款冷却器与您一样勤勤恳恳，有助于保障您的整艘飞船在合适的温度参数范围内运行良好。

cryo-star.name: Cryo-Star
cryo-star.description: J-Span's consumer-grade Cryo-Star cooler has become a common sight across the Empire thanks to its reliable heat absorption that won't strain your ship's power-plant.
cryo-star.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：J-Span
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：民用

由J-Span所生产的消费级冷却器 冷冻之星之所以成为帝国里一款普及大众的产品，这得益于它可靠的散热性能而不会让你的飞船电力吃紧。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

cryo-star-ex.name: Cryo-Star EX
cryo-star-ex.description: With its EX line, J-Span has brought the same reliable heat absorption of their popular Cryo-Star cooler to pilots looking to outfit larger ships.
cryo-star-ex.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：J-Span
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：民用

J-Span将其受欢迎的冷冻之星 冷却器带入了EX型的生产线上，为驾驶更大型飞船的驾驶员带来可靠的散热使用体验。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

cryo-star-sl.name: Cryo-Star SL
cryo-star-sl.description: J-Span's done it again. The Cryo-Star SL incorporates the same consumer award winning performance and durability you've come to expect from a Cryo-Star, but now available for smaller vehicles.
cryo-star-sl.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：J-Span
尺寸：0
等级：B
分类：民用

J-Span又一次做到了。低温之星 SL具有消费者们赞不绝口的原版"低温之星"相同的性能和耐用性，但现在可用于较小型的车辆。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

cryo-star-xl.name: Cryo-Star XL
cryo-star-xl.description: With its well-crafted design and dependable performance, the Cryo-Star XL cooler proves from the moment you use it that no one understands heat management better than J-Span.
cryo-star-xl.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：J-Span
尺寸：3
等级：B
分类：民用

凭借其精心设计和可靠的性能，低温之星 XL冷却器从您使用的那一刻起就证明，没有人比J-Span更了解温度管理。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

draug.name: Draug
draug.description: The Draug balances performance, durability, and stealth. Making this large Wen/Cassel cooler ready to respond to any situation you find yourself in.
draug.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：温/卡塞尔推进 (Wen/Cassel Propulsion)
尺寸：3
等级：C
分类：民用

德劳格冷却器在性能，耐用性和隐蔽性之间取得了平衡。因此，这个温-卡塞尔公司出品的大型冷却器在面对不同的状况时都能助您一臂之力。

eco-flow.name: Eco-Flow
eco-flow.description: A standard for centuries, Juno Starwerk's industrial Eco-Flow cooler is a favorite of haulers for being easy to maintain even when carrying the heaviest cargo loads.
eco-flow.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：工业

几个世纪的标杆，朱诺星际工厂的工业级"生态流"冷却器是运输业的最爱，即使运送最重的货物也可以轻松维护。

elsen.name: Elsen
elsen.description: Wen/Cassel engineers used many of the same parts found in the Draug, only fine tuned to deliver improved performance and durability without greatly enhancing its signature. That makes the Elsen large cooler a worthy upgrade for those that can handle the extra heat.
elsen.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：温/卡塞尔推进 (Wen/Cassel Propulsion)
尺寸：3
等级：B
分类：民用

温-卡塞尔的工程师在这款冷却器之中使用了很多来自德劳格冷却器相同部件。他们对其进行了一定的调整，在保证其不大幅度增强信号的情况下，仍能提供更好的性能和耐用性。这使得埃尔森大型冷却器对那些需要处理更多的热量的人来说，是一个非常划算的升级方案。

endo.name: Endo
endo.description: A cooler for discerning ship-owners who are looking to push their craft further, Wen/Cassel's Endo features above average cooling performance and thoughtful design.
endo.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：温/卡塞尔推进 (Wen/Cassel Propulsion)
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：民用

作为一款专为想要将飞船发挥到极致的飞船行家所设计的冷却器， 温-卡塞尔公司(Wen/Cassel)的内冷表现出的是超凡的散热性能和周到的设计。

exotherm.name: Exotherm
exotherm.description: This capital-class cooler was designed specifically for the Idris frigate.
exotherm.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：4

这款主力舰级的冷却器是专门为伊德里斯级护卫舰设计的。

flashfreeze.name: FlashFreeze
flashfreeze.description: With the FlashFreeze, Lightning Power makes sure that no matter how hot things get, you can rely on its proven cooling technology to keep you flying.
flashfreeze.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：闪电之力有限公司 (Lightning Power Ltd.)
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：民用

用了极冻冷却器，闪电之力公司(Lightning Power Ltd.)向您保证不管有多热，你都能依靠它成熟的冷却技术来继续飞行。

fridan.name: Fridan
fridan.description: The Fridan is Wen/Cassel Propulsion's entry-level vehicle cooler. It has proven time and again that it can withstand even the worst environmental conditions, making it an ideal component for your vehicle.
fridan.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：温/卡塞尔推进 (Wen/Cassel Propulsion)
尺寸：0
等级：C
分类：民用

弗里达是温/卡塞尔推进的入门级车载冷却器。 它已经一次又一次证明，它可以承受最恶劣的环境条件， 使它成为您车辆的理想组件。

frostbite.name: FrostBite
frostbite.description: Keep your ship running smoothly with the Lightning Power FrostBite handling your thermal management needs. This consumer-grade cooler can process extra-heat and help maintain optimal running temperatures for all your components.
frostbite.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：闪电之力有限公司 (Lightning Power Ltd.)
尺寸：3
等级：B
分类：民用

通过闪电之力公司"冻伤"冷却器来处理您的热量管理需求，可以使您的飞船保持平稳运行。这款消费级冷却器可以处理多余的热量，并有助于保持所有组件的在最佳温度下运行。

frostburn.name: FrostBurn
frostburn.description: Lightning Power Ltd. has put its years of design expertise and manufacturing know-how to craft the FrostBurn, an effective cooler that can handle the large scale heat management needs of a wide variety of ships on the market.
frostburn.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：闪电之力有限公司 (Lightning Power Ltd.)
尺寸：3
等级：C
分类：民用

闪电之力公司将其多年来的独特设计和制造工艺融入到了霜蚀 冷却器中， 这是一款高效的冷却器能够处理市场上各种船舶的大规模热量应对需求。

frost-star.name: Frost-Star
frost-star.description: Noted for its consistent performance, the Frost-Star cooler from J-Span has many admirers for its well-balanced power to heat ratio.
frost-star.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：J-Span
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：民用

J-Span的 寒霜之星 冷却器以其一贯的优秀表现而著称，寒霜之星 同时也因为因其良好的功率热比而受到许多崇拜者追捧。

frost-star-ex.name: Frost-Star EX
frost-star-ex.description: The Frost-Star EX cooler comes to you from J-Span, a manufacturer with a well deserved reputation among ship owners for constructing coolers that can reliably handle heat exchange wherever you may fly.
frost-star-ex.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：J-Span
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：民用

这款寒霜之星冷却器现在从J-Span来到你身边， 该制造商在船东们的圈子里颇有声誉， 其制造的冷却器不论在何时何地都能为您的飞船进行可靠的散热交换。

frost-star-sl.name: Frost-Star SL
frost-star-sl.description: Whether cruising across the ground or sailing through space, there's a J-Span cooler perfect for you. The Frost-Star SL is a mid-tier cooler designed to bring the line's reliability to ground and open-canopy vehicles.
frost-star-sl.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：J-Span
尺寸：0
等级：C
分类：民用

不论是在地表巡行还是星际穿越，这款 J-Span 冷却器都是你最好的选择. 寒霜之星 SL 是一款能为地面或敞篷载具带来一贯的可靠性体验的中端冷却器。

frost-star-xl.name: Frost-Star XL
frost-star-xl.description: As your ship flies, components generate heat that can be damaging and even lead to system failures unless properly dealt with by a dependable and properly designed cooler like the Frost-Star XL from J-Span.
frost-star-xl.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：J-Span 
尺寸：3
等级：C
分类：民用

当您驾驶着您的飞船在空间中驰骋时，飞船的部件仍会不断地产生热量并有可能在没有被妥善处理的情况下造成损坏甚至导致系统出错的发生。为此，像是这款由J-Span制造的冰霜之星 XL的冷却器会是您合理且可靠的选择。

fullfrost.name: FullFrost
fullfrost.description: Proper thermal management and heat distribution is a concern for any pilot who cares about the longevity and performance of their ship. Now you can fly easy knowing you have the advanced FullFrost cooler by Lightning Power aboard.
fullfrost.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：闪电之力有限公司 (Lightning Power Ltd.)
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：民用

对于任何关心飞船寿命和性能的飞行员来说，适当的热量管理和分配都是一个不小的问题。现在，您已经拥有了闪电之力先进的"冻结"冷却器，会让您的飞行更轻松。

galinstan.name: Galinstan
galinstan.description: The Galinstan is an older model cooler originally developed for the UEE Navy. Its specs won't knock your socks off but it remains a solid entry level, large cooler.
galinstan.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：3
等级：D 
分类：军用

液态合金是一款较老型号且原本专为UEE海军开发的冷却器。它的规格或许并不会让您大吃一惊，可依旧是有着扎实水平的入门级大型冷却器。

gelid.name: Gelid
gelid.description: Allowing for greater thermo-dispersal and improved performance output, the top-of-the-line Gelid cooler from Wen/Cassel is an all-inclusive heat management system ideal for a variety of ships.
gelid.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：温/卡塞尔推进 (Wen/Cassel Propulsion)
尺寸：1
等级：A
分类：民用

来自温/卡塞尔推进的顶级"若冰"冷却器可提供更好的散热性能和更高的功率输出，是适用于各种飞船的全包式热管理系统。

glacier.name: Glacier
glacier.description: Your weapons, your shields, your thrusters. All vital during combat, all generating heat. Enter the Glacier cooler from Aegis Dynamics. A best-in-class heat management system designed to keep you cool as the pressure mounts.
glacier.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：1
等级：A
分类：军用

你的武器，护盾和推进器在战斗中至关重要，它们都会产生热量. 快到圣盾动力加入冰川冷却器的一员. 一套一流的热量管理系统能让你的设备在压力上升的时候保持凉爽。

graupel.name: Graupel
graupel.description: The Graupel not only provides the top of the line cooling technology that larger ships need to maintain optimal performance, it does it with Wen/Cassel's signature craftsmanship.
graupel.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：温/卡塞尔推进 (Wen/Cassel Propulsion)
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：民用

软雹不但提供了大型飞船所需的顶尖冷却技术， 而且采用的是温-卡塞尔(Wen/Cassel)标志性的工艺制程。

heatsafe.name: HeatSafe
heatsafe.description: Pilots looking to keep their IR signature low rely on Tyler Design & Tech. As an entry level cooler, the HeatSafe not only limits emissions, it is built with Tyler's satisfaction guarantee.
heatsafe.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：泰勒设计与技术公司 
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：隐形

希望保持低热信号的驾驶员们都十分信赖泰勒设计与技术公司。 作为一款低端入门的冷却器， 设备的安全热控并不会影响散热性能， 泰勒设计与技术公司荣誉出品。

heatsink.name: HeatSink
heatsink.description: The HeatSink produces low signatures without sacrificing too much performance or durability, making it a reliable stealth component.
heatsink.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：泰勒设计与技术公司
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：隐形

这个冷却器能在不牺牲太多性能或耐用性的情况下，保持较低特征信号，令其成为一个可靠的隐形部件。

hydrocel.name: Hydrocel
hydrocel.description: Keep your ship working harder for longer with the durable Hydrocel, an entry-level industrial cooler from respected manufacturer Juno Starwerk.
hydrocel.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：1
等级：D
分类：工业

坚实耐用的"水凝"，是一款由著名制造商朱诺星际工厂生产的入门级工业冷却器，让您的飞船高效工作更长时间。

hydrojet.name: HydroJet
hydrojet.description: When your ship overheats, it makes just about any task not only more difficult, but potentially dangerous for you and your crew. With the entry-level HydroJet from Juno Starwerk installed, you can be confident that your heat levels are being controlled by a cooler designed by one of the most trustworthy names in the industry.
hydrojet.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：2
等级：D
分类：工业

当您飞船过热时，它不仅会使您的任务更加艰巨，而且还会给您和船员带来潜在的威胁。安装朱诺星际工厂的入门级冷却器"喷射"，让最值得信赖的业内品牌之一来为您飞船的热量保驾护航。

hydropulse.name: Hydropulse
hydropulse.description: An entry level option to Juno Starwerk's brand of coolers, the Hydropulse sacrifices some durability and utilizes some design tricks to make this large industrial cooler an option for those unable to afford one of their top of the line models.
hydropulse.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：3
等级：D
分类：工业

。作为朱诺星际工厂(Juno Starwerk)的入门级冷却器品牌， 水冷脉冲冷却器牺牲了一些可靠性， 并采用了一些设计上的简化技巧， 令这款大型工业级冷却器成为那些负担不起顶级配置的人的不二选择。

icebox.name: IceBox
icebox.description: The IceBox is an upgrade to the company's standard medium cooler, as the team at Tyler Design & Tech made a number of subtle modifications and material upgrades that lowered the component's signatures without greatly affecting its durability.
icebox.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：泰勒设计与技术公司
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：隐形

冰块是该公司内标准中型冷却器的升级版， 泰勒设计与技术公司团队对其进行了一些细微的改进和材料的升级， 在不会大幅影响效能的情况下降低了组件的信号。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

icedive.name: IceDive
icedive.description: The IceDive delivers peak performance over other medium coolers of its grade, though it does come at the cost of generating high IR and EM signatures.
icedive.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：ACOM
尺寸：2
等级：C 
分类：竞赛

冰潜能够带来远超同级别中型冷却器的强悍性能，但是代价便是它会对外发出更强的电磁和红外信号。

ice-flush.name: Ice-Flush
ice-flush.description: The Juno Starwerk Ice-Flush cooler is built to withstand the heat demands and thermal strains that many industrial ships deal with as part of their average workday.
ice-flush.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：3
等级：B
分类：工业

来自朱诺星际工厂的"冰冲"冷却器可以应付工业飞船在日常工作中对散热和温度应变的需求。

iceplunge.name: IcePlunge
iceplunge.description: When you're pushing your ship to the limit during that frantic last lap, you'll be glad you have ACOM's IcePlunge to keep things cool.
iceplunge.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：ACOM
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：竞赛

当你在比赛紧张刺激的最后一圈里竭尽全力压榨飞船的每一丝潜能时，你会庆幸自己使用了ACOM的"冰浴"来让一切保持冷静.

kelvid.name: Kelvid
kelvid.description: The Kelvid is a high performance, rough and tumble cooler system designed to keep your vehicle humming for longer, rather than catching its breath.
kelvid.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：温/卡塞尔推进 (Wen/Cassel Propulsion)
尺寸：0
等级：B
分类：民用

凯尔维德是一种高性能且暴力的冷却器系统，旨在使您的车辆持久轰鸣，不再受到限制。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

kragen.name: Kragen
kragen.description: When you go big, get nothing but the best. The Kragen from Wen/Cassel Propulsion has consistently been rated among the best large, commercial coolers available on the market.
kragen.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：温/卡塞尔推进 (Wen/Cassel Propulsion)
尺寸：3
等级：A
分类：民用

大的就是好，做到最大，得到最好。温-卡塞尔出品的克拉根，一直以来都被誉为市场上最好的大型商用冷却器。

mauler-cooler.name: Mauler Cooler
mauler-cooler.description: This Vanduul cooler processes the excessive heat generated by the Mauler during intense combat.
mauler-cooler.description_zh: 这款剜度冷却器负责处理重拳在激烈战斗中产生的过剩热量。

mercury-9.name: Mercury
mercury-9.description: In combat situations, even the smallest advantage can lead to big gains. With Aegis' Mercury cooling system onboard, you'll be able to push your ship hotter for longer when you need it most.
mercury-9.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：3
等级：C
分类：军用

在战斗中，即使微小的优势也可以带来巨大的收益。圣盾的船载"水银"冷却系统能让飞船当你需要她的时候在高温工作下更持久。

nightfall.name: NightFall
nightfall.description: Run silent and safe with the NightFall from Tyler Design & Tech. Few coolers can match the way this component manages your ship's heat while also keeping its signatures low.
nightfall.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：泰勒设计与技术公司
尺寸：2
等级：A
分类：隐身

 泰勒设计与技术公司的夜幕降临冷却器能让您无声无息地安全逃脱。 这款组件能够在保持低信号的同时合理处理您的飞船发热。 在效果上鲜有冷却器能与之媲美。

permafrost.name: Permafrost
permafrost.description: Designed by Aegis to military standards, the Permafrost cooler has proven itself time and again to be more than capable of handling heat processing even while under the strains of combat.
permafrost.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：军用

由圣盾动力根据军事标准设计，冻土冷却器已经多次证明了自己能力，即使在战斗压力下也能胜任散热工作。

polar.name: Polar
polar.description: Built to the high demands of daily military service, Aegis' Polar cooler features a reinforced frame for increased durability. You can rest assured that when you drop into the fires of combat, the Polar will keep your ship cool.
polar.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：军用

为满足日常军事服务的高要求而建造的圣盾极地冷却器，特点在于为了可靠性而加装的加固架.  当你陷入战火时大可放心去干，这款极地会让你的飞船时刻保持凉爽。

quikcool.name: QuikCool
quikcool.description: The QuikCool provides superior performance over other coolers in its class. This competition grade component from ACOM sacrifices stealth and some durability to be one of the most powerful entry-level coolers around.
quikcool.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：ACOM
尺寸：1
等级：D
分类： 竞赛

"快冷" 与同级的冷却器相比提供了更加卓越的性能.这款来自舰船部件制造商 (ACOM)的竞赛级组件牺牲了隐形性能和一定的寿命，成为圈内最强大的入门级冷却器之一。

rapidcool.name: RapidCool
rapidcool.description: ACOM brings its performance first philosophy to this medium cooler. The RapidCool trades signature strength and durability for better performance.
rapidcool.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：ACOM
尺寸：2
等级：D 
分类：竞赛

ACOM将其性能至上的理念注入了这款中型冷却器之中。迅冷冷却器用较高的红外及电磁信号强度和稍逊一筹的耐久性换取了更为出色的性能。

serac.name: Serac
serac.description: Only available for Origin Jumpworks' luxury liner, Wen/Cassel specially designed the Serac cooler to keep the 890 Jump operational through the diverse conditions typically encountered while cruising the stars.
serac.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：温-卡塞尔 (Wen/Cassel)
尺寸：4
等级：定制
分类：民用

仅特供于起源跃动工厂(Origin Jumpworks)的豪华客船上，温-卡塞尔公司(Wen/Cassel)特别设计了这款冰塔 冷却器 以保证890跃动在巡游星空时能在各种典型条件下正常运转。

serac-2.name: Serac
serac-2.description: Only available for Origin Jumpworks' luxury liner, Wen/Cassel specially designed the Serac cooler to keep the 890 Jump operational through the diverse conditions typically encountered while cruising the stars.
serac-2.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：温-卡塞尔 (Wen/Cassel)
尺寸：4
等级：定制
分类：民用

仅特供于起源跃动工厂(Origin Jumpworks)的豪华客船上，温-卡塞尔公司(Wen/Cassel)特别设计了这款冰塔 冷却器 以保证890跃动在巡游星空时能在各种典型条件下正常运转。

snowblind.name: SnowBlind
snowblind.description: An IR signature that is running hot is a surefire way to alert the entire sector to your whereabouts and can often potentially prove to be dangerous. With the Tyler Design & Tech Snowblind cooling system onboard you can significantly reduce your heat emissions while keeping your ship running within optimal thermal conditions.
snowblind.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：泰勒设计与技术公司
尺寸：1
等级：A
分类：隐形

红外信号辐射是一种向所有人暴露你行踪的可靠的方法，不过这通常比较危险。借助泰勒设计技术的"雪盲"飞船冷却系统，您可以显着减少发热量，让飞船在最佳温度条件下运行。

snowfall.name: Snowfall
snowfall.description: Few things can be as damaging to your ship over time as excess heat build up. The Juno Starwerk Snowfall cooler helps ensure that your ship stays the right temperature for longer, which means that you can keep flying for longer.
snowfall.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：工业

随着时间的流逝，除了多余的热量几乎没有别的东西会损坏你的飞船了。朱诺星际工厂的"降雪"冷却器确保您的飞船能在合适的温度下坚持得更久，这为长时间飞行提供了保障。

snowpack.name: Snowpack
snowpack.description: Medium-sized industrial coolers don't get any better than the Snowpack from Juno Starwerk. Outstanding performance and durability have made it a favorite of haulers for centuries.
snowpack.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：2
等级：A 
分类：工业

在中型工业冷却器里没有比朱诺星际工厂(Juno Starwerk)的“雪堆”更好的。数百年来，出色的性能和耐用性使其成为货船的最爱。

taiga.name: Taiga
taiga.description: Wen/Cassel has worked long and hard to develop quality coolers like the latest edition Taiga, which can process and manage excess heat while consistently maintaining the high standards that they have become known for.
taiga.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：温/卡塞尔推进 (Wen/Cassel Propulsion)
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：民用

温-卡塞尔(Wen/Cassel)长期以来一直致力于开发出像最新版的寒林这样的优质冷却器， 它能以为人所知的高标准来处理和应付过热情况。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

tempest.name: Tempest
tempest.description: On the frontlines, you want to know that your ship is going to perform as expected when you need it most. The mil-spec Tempest cooler sees to it that you can operate within safe thermal ratings for longer thanks to advanced manufacturing by Aegis.
tempest.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：3
等级：B
分类：军用

在前线，飞船会像你期望的那样平稳运行。军用规格的"暴风雨"冷却器证明借助圣盾动力的先进制造技术，您的飞船可以在安全的热值下运行更长的时间。

tepilo.name: Tepilo
tepilo.description: Few can top the cooling power of Wen/Cassel's Tepilo. This top of the line cooler provides stellar durability and performance for ground vehicles.
tepilo.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：温/卡塞尔推进 (Wen/Cassel Propulsion)
尺寸：0
等级：A
分类：民用

。 很少有其他冷却器可以超越温-卡塞尔公司(Wen/Cassel )的微温冷却器。 这款顶级的冷却器为地面载具提供了卓越的可靠性和性能。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

thermalcore.name: ThermalCore
thermalcore.description: When you're in the middle of an important job, you don't want to waste time wondering if your cooler is doing its part. Now you don't have to. With the dependable mid-level ThermalCore cooler from Juno Starwerk onboard, you can take all the guesswork out of heat management.
thermalcore.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：3
等级：C
分类：工业

当你正执行一项重要的任务时，你肯定不希望浪费无谓的时间去担心你的冷却器是否正常工作。从现在开始您便无需顾虑。搭载朱若星际工厂可靠的中级"热量核心"冷却器，你就可以安心的将飞船温度的问题置之脑后。

thermax.name: Thermax
thermax.description: Juno Starwerk has done it again. With the Thermax line of coolers, Juno raised the bar on economical industrial coolers made to fit any budget. These small coolers offer above average performance and durability but without breaking the bank.
thermax.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：工业

朱诺星际工厂再一次卫冕。通过"温度美"系列冷却器，朱诺提高了经济型工业冷却器的标准，以满足任何预算需求。这些小型冷却器提供了高于平均行业水平的性能和耐用性，且不至于掏空某人的钱包。

tundra.name: Tundra
tundra.description: Constructed by Aegis with military performance in mind, the Tundra's reliable performance has made it a standard cooler of the UEE Navy.
tundra.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：1
等级：D
分类：军用

由圣盾公司按照心中的军事表现所构建的 "冻原"冷却器，它可靠的性能使其成为了UEE海军标配的冷却器。

ultra-flow.name: Ultra-Flow
ultra-flow.description: Juno Starwerk has crafted the Ultra-Flow to not only withstand the demanding cooling needs of your ship's systems as it works, but to do it longer and better than other coolers in its class.
ultra-flow.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：1
等级：A
分类：工业

朱诺星际工厂精心设计研发了这款"终极对流"冷却器，不仅能在运作时满足飞船系统的冷却需求，而且比同类别的其他冷却器更加耐用牢靠。

vaporblock.name: VaporBlock
vaporblock.description: Few coolers can match the stealth performance of the VaporBlock. The team at Tyler Design & Tech have crafted a cooler that keeps your ship's signature low while delivering acceptable durability and performance.
vaporblock.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：泰勒设计与技术公司
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：隐形

很少有冷却器能和蒸汽遏制的隐身性能相媲美。泰勒设计与技术公司的团队精心设计的这款冷却器既能让您的飞船保持低信号工作又能保留令人满意的可靠性和性能。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

whiteout.name: WhiteOut
whiteout.description: Your ship faces a lot of extreme conditions while flying. From the coldness of space to the burning heat of a desert planet, the last thing you want to worry about is if your cooler can keep up. The entry-level WhiteOut from Lightning Power provides thermal management that can help make sure you get where you're going.
whiteout.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：闪电之力有限公司 (Lightning Power Ltd.)
尺寸：2
等级：D
分类：民用

您的飞船在航行中要面对许多极端条件。从寒冷的太空到炽热的沙漠星球，您最担心的就是冷却器能否保持正常运转。闪电之力公司的入门级“白苍”冷却器提供了热量管理功能，可以确保您安全到达目的地。

winter-star.name: Winter-Star
winter-star.description: Join the J-Span family by snagging the Winter-Star cooler for your ship. This entry-level model lacks flash but its strong performance record and price point make it a popular choice for pilots across the UEE.
winter-star.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：J-Span
尺寸：1
等级：D
分类：民用

加入J-Span的大家庭， 就从为您的爱船购买严冬之星 冷却器开始。 这款入门级的冷却器虽然没什么亮点，但其强大的效能记录和其售价令它成为了UEE内许多驾驶员们的首选。

winter-star-ex.name: Winter-Star EX
winter-star-ex.description: The Winter-Star EX is a baseline cooler you can trust. Built by the experts at J-Span, it's ready to handle whatever conditions you encounter.
winter-star-ex.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：J-Span 
尺寸：2
等级：D
分类：民用

这款严冬之星 EX 是一款值得您信任的基准冷却器。它由J-Span的专家所打造，已经准备好面对您所会遇到的一切情况。

winter-star-sl.name: Winter-Star SL
winter-star-sl.description: The latest in J-Span's Winter-Star line of coolers, the SL's new Kivo system offers a unique dispersal method, allowing your vehicle to manage heat better than ever before.
winter-star-sl.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：J-Span
尺寸：0
等级：D
分类：民用

这是在J-Span 严冬之星 冷却器产线上的最新产品，SL型搭载了最新的 基沃(Kivo)系统，它提供了一个更为独特的散热方案，令您载具的应付高温的能力更上一层楼。

winter-star-xl.name: Winter-Star XL
winter-star-xl.description: For two centuries, J-Span has dedicated itself to manufacturing coolers. The Winter-Star XL is their entry level large cooler. What it lacks in features, it more than makes up for in solid craftsmanship.
winter-star-xl.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：J-Span 
尺寸：3
等级：D
分类：民用

两个世纪以来， J-Span 一直致力于制造冷却器。 严冬之星 XL 是他们推出的入门级大型冷却器。它在功能上的不足，于扎实的工艺上得到了弥补。

zerorush.name: ZeroRush
zerorush.description: Few things can push your ship to its limits like racing. Going faster and harder generates a lot of excess heat that can take a toll on your system if not properly managed. The ZeroRush cooler from ACOM has what it takes to get you across the finish line.
zerorush.description_zh:
物品类型：冷却器
制造商：ACOM
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：竞赛

很少有像竞速这样可以将您的飞船性能推向极限的事情了。持续加速会产生大量多余的热量，如果管理不当可能会对您的系统造成损害。ACOM的"零度激流"冷却器助你勇争第一。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

bolide.name: Bolide
bolide.description: The Bolide power plant from Aegis has logged innumerable hours of flight experience and is frequently used by the UEE Navy and security forces across the Empire.
bolide.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：军用

来自圣盾的火流星发电机拥有无数小时的飞行经验，在UEE海军和整个帝国的安全部队中十分常用。

breton.name: Breton
breton.description: The Breton embodies exactly what Juno Starwerk engineers wanted out of an industrial power plant - utilitarian, easy to repair and extremely powerful. You'll be hard pressed to find a better balance of performance and durability from a unit this size.
breton.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：1
等级：A
分类：工业

"布列塔尼"完全体现了朱诺星际工厂工程师们对工业发电机的期望—实用，容易维修和性能强大。您很难从同尺寸的设备中找到除它以外能在性能与耐用性之间做出更好平衡的设备了。

celestial.name: Celestial
celestial.description: The Celestial from Sakura Sun improves upon the company's base large power plant by redesigning the power rate and other key aspects to raise the component's overall performance.
celestial.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：樱日集团 (Sakura Sun)
尺寸：3
等级：B
分类：民用

樱日集团的"天体"通过重新设计输出功率和其他关键内容来改善该公司的大型发电机，用以提高组件的整体性能。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

centurion.name: Centurion
centurion.description: The Centurion stands ready to power your ship. This large power plant from Aegis Dynamics has been in service for centuries and has consistently proven to supply solid performance and durability.
centurion.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：3
等级：C
分类：军用

百夫长时刻准备为您的船提供动力。这款来自圣盾动力的大型发电机已经服务了几个世纪，并且一次又一次地被证实可以提供可靠且耐用的性能。

charger.name: Charger
charger.description: The Aegis Charger has powered military fighters for generations. Tried and tested in the most demanding of situations, the Charger can handle sudden or sustained power draws with ease.
charger.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：1
等级：D
分类：军用

圣盾发电机已经为军事战斗机提供了数代的动力。在最苛刻的情况下经过验证和测试，战马可以轻松应对突变或持续的的功耗。

cirrus.name: Cirrus
cirrus.description: The Cirrus is for pilots that prioritize stealth above all else. This medium power plant from Tyler Design & Tech intelligently manages its energy distribution flow and performance output to achieve that end.
cirrus.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：泰勒设计与技术公司
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：隐形

"西锐"适合那些喜欢隐秘行动的飞行员。为实现这一目标，泰勒设计与技术公司的这款中型发电机可以智能地管理其能量分配和性能输出。

daybreak.name: DayBreak
daybreak.description: Sakura Sun knows exactly what you need. The DayBreak is a straightforward power plant that provides parity to its performance, durability, and stealth stats.
daybreak.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：樱日集团 (Sakura Sun)
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：民用

樱日集团知你所需.破晓是一个简洁明了，并在性能，耐久性和隐秘性方面提供均衡表现的发电机。

defiant.name: Defiant
defiant.description: In this cutthroat universe, the competition doesn't stop when you do. That's why you need the Defiant industrial power plant equipped in your vehicle. It's optimized by the experts at Juno Starwerk to provide unmatched performance compared to other components in its class.
defiant.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：0
等级：B
分类：工业

在这个残酷的世界里，竞争不会随着你的放弃而终止。这就是为何你需要装备"挑战"发电机。朱诺星际工厂的专家对其进行了优化，以提供远超同类其他组件的性能。

deltamax.name: DeltaMax
deltamax.description: Expert engineering made significant breakthroughs possible when designing the DeltaMax, resulting in a stealth signature even lower than originally estimated by the team at Tyler Design and Tech.
deltamax.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：泰勒设计与技术公司
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：隐形

专业工程学使得德尔塔Max取得重大突破成为可能，成品的隐身信号特征指标比泰勒设计与技术的团队预测的要更低。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

diligence.name: Diligence
diligence.description: Though the Diligence delivers high performance compared to other components in its class, this power plant's dependability and ease of maintenance is what makes it a favorite of haulers.
diligence.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：工业

尽管“勤奋”比同类产品具有更高的性能，但其可靠性和易维护性也使其在运输行业中更受青睐。

drassik.name: Drassik
drassik.description: The Drassik is a military-grade power plant from Aegis Dynamics. The large component is known for providing decent durability but unremarkable performance.
drassik.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：3
等级：D
分类：军用

德拉西克是圣盾动力公司生产的军用级别的发电机。该大型组件以提供良好的耐用性而闻名，但性能平平。

durajet.name: DuraJet
durajet.description: The DuraJet is Lightning Power Ltd.'s base vehicle power plant. Not only does its design catch the eye, but its reliable construction and affordable price point make it a prime option to keep power flowing through your vehicle.
durajet.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：闪电之力有限公司 (Lightning Power Ltd.)
尺寸：0
等级：D
分类：民用

杜拉汞是闪电之力有限公司的基础载具发电机。不仅它的设计引人注目，而且其可靠的构造和价格合理的价格使其成为保持载具动力流的主要选择。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

durango.name: Durango
durango.description: The Durango is the peak of large power plants produced by Juno Starwerk. This top-of-the-line industrial component provides unmatched energy dispersion that minimizes fluctuations and surges during heavy demand.
durango.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：3
等级：A
分类：工业

"杜兰戈"是朱诺星际工厂生产的大型发电机中的巅峰之作。这种顶级的工业组件提供了无与伦比的电力供应，能最大限度地减少需要大量供能时的能量波动。

dynaflux.name: DynaFlux
dynaflux.description: The DynaFlux was one of the first components A&R Co. built when they expanded their product line to more than energy weapons. Their years of experience manufacturing military-grade equipment went a long way to making the DynaFlux power plant a standout right from the beginning.
dynaflux.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：亚蒙里斯公司 (Amon & Reese Co.)
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：军用

动力流是亚蒙里斯公司在将产品线扩展到能量武器时之外制造的第一批组件之一。他们多年制造军用设备的经验使得动力流电源从一开始就脱颖而出。

eclipse.name: Eclipse
eclipse.description: Competing medium power plants struggle to match the heat and signature reduction of the Eclipse. Tyler Design & Tech's mastery of stealth tech makes this component a must own by those who prefer to go unnoticed.
eclipse.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：泰勒设计与技术公司
尺寸：2
等级：A
分类：隐形 

同类中型竞品很难与日蚀的低热量与信号特征相竞争。泰勒设计与技术对隐身科技的精通使得此组件成为了那些喜欢保持低调之人的必选。

endurance.name: Endurance
endurance.description: Juno Starwerk's Endurance has been in service since the 26th century. This industrial strength, utilitarian power plant is a favorite of mechanics since spare parts are easily acquired.
endurance.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：工业

朱诺星际工厂的"耐力"发电机从26世纪服役至今。由于零件很容易获得，这个实用的工业电源是机械师们的最爱。

exogen.name: ExoGen
exogen.description: Simple and direct, the ExoGen generates power in traditional A&R style: no fuss, just solid craftsmanship.
exogen.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：亚蒙里斯 (Amon & Reese Co.)
尺寸：2
等级：D
分类：军用

简单而直接，"外生"发电机以传统的亚蒙里斯公司风格为全船供能：在这里没有油嘴滑舌，只有坚固的工艺。

fierell-cascade.name: Fierell Cascade
fierell-cascade.description: Rely on Aegis' expertise to power your ship. The Fierell Cascade is a military-grade power plant that prioritizes performance over everything else.
fierell-cascade.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：军用

依靠圣盾的专业知识为您的舰船提供动力。菲耶尔级联是一个军事级别的发电机，性能的优先级高于一切。

fortitude.name: Fortitude
fortitude.description: Beloved by haulers for centuries, the Fortitude lives up to its name by reliably producing power when needed most.
fortitude.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：工业

数个世纪以来，它一直被搬运工们所喜爱，能够在他们最需要的时候可靠地提供能量。

fulgur.name: Fulgur
fulgur.description: Tried and tested by the UEE Navy on the Vanduul front, the Fulgur large power plant from Aegis Dynamics is now available for all to put to use protecting what's important.
fulgur.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：3
等级：B
分类：军用

圣盾动力的灿烂大型发电机由UEE海军在与剜度的战场上进行了试验和测试，现已面向全体公众出售，用以保护重要部分。

fullforce.name: FullForce
fullforce.description: This power plant from Lightning Power Ltd. delivers balanced performance, durability and emissions, providing consumers with a "FullForce" of options as to how to use it.
fullforce.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：闪电之力有限公司 (Lightning Power Ltd.)
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：民用

闪电之力有限公司的这种发电机提供平衡的性能，耐用性和排放，为消费者提供如何使用“ 全力” 的说明。

fullforce-pro.name: FullForce Pro
fullforce-pro.description: Even though Lightning Power Ltd has updated the look of the FullForce Pro power plant, it still delivers that same balanced performance people have come to expect.
fullforce-pro.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：闪电之力有限公司 (Lightning Power Ltd.)
尺寸：3
等级：C
分类：民用

即使闪电之力有限公司更新了全力 专业发电机的外观，它仍然保留了万众瞩目的平衡的性能。

gammamax.name: GammaMax
gammamax.description: A complete overhaul of the materials in the heatsinks dramatically decreased the emission level of the GammaMax. Few medium power plants run as quiet at the same price point of this one from Tyler Design & Tech.
gammamax.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：泰勒设计与技术公司
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：隐形

对散热器材料的整体重置极大地降低了伽马Max的热量散发水平。很少有同价竞品能与泰勒设计与技术的这款产品一样安静地运行。

genoa.name: Genoa
genoa.description: According to Juno Starwerk, good industrial design is meant to go unnoticed, yet it's hard not to marvel at the Genoa medium power plant, as its outstanding performance and noted durability make it a first-rate component.
genoa.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：2
等级：A
分类：工业

根据朱诺星际工厂的说法，好的工业设计注定会被忽视，但很难不惊叹于热那亚中级发电机，因为其出色的性能和耐用性使其成为一流的组件。

ginzel.name: Ginzel
ginzel.description: The unique name for this stalwart industrial power plant was inspired by the nickname of a Juno Starwerk junior engineer who helped design it.
ginzel.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：3
等级：C
分类：工业

这款坚固的工业发电机的独特的名称，受到了协助设计的朱诺星际工厂初级工程师的昵称的启发。

hypergen.name: HyperGen
hypergen.description: The HyperGen power plant is popular among both civilians and the military for its high quality. As a bonus, the manufacture, Amon & Reese, is famous for its stellar customer service.
hypergen.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：亚蒙里斯 (Amon & Reese Co.)
尺寸：1
等级：D
分类：军用

“极生”发电机以其优异的品质深受平民和军队的欢迎。值得一提的是，这家名为亚蒙里斯的公司因其一流的客户服务而闻名。

ionburst.name: IonBurst
ionburst.description: The IonBurst is touted by Lightning Power as being a best-in-class power plant, providing unequaled performance for the price.
ionburst.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：闪电之力有限公司 (Lightning Power Ltd.)
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：民用

"离子爆裂(IonBurst)"被闪电之力认定为最一流的发电机，是它所在的价格区间里性能最好的。

ionsurge.name: IonSurge
ionsurge.description: Lightning Power Ltd.'s line of medium power plants reach their pinnacle with the IonSurge. Design innovation and higher quality materials push this component's performance higher than others in its class.
ionsurge.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：闪电之力有限公司 (Lightning Power Ltd.)
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：民用

闪电之力有限公司的中型发电机系列凭借离子奔涌达到了顶峰。设计创新和更高品质的材料使该组件的性能比同类产品更高。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

ionsurge-pro.name: IonSurge Pro
ionsurge-pro.description: Power plants from Lightning Power Ltd. don't get much bigger or better than the IonSurge Pro. This top-of-the-line large power plant focuses on delivering solid results to keep your ship working longer.
ionsurge-pro.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：闪电之力有限公司 (Lightning Power Ltd.)
尺寸：3
等级：B
分类：民用

闪电之力有限公司的发电机没有比"离子奔涌 Pro"更大更好的了。这个顶级的大型发电机致力于提供可靠的能量输出，以使您的飞船拥有更长的工作时间。

ionwave.name: IonWave
ionwave.description: The IonWave vehicle power plant can help you confidently summit the heights of most peaks without overheating thanks to the incredible technology inside designed by the folks at Lightning Power Ltd.
ionwave.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：闪电之力有限公司 (Lightning Power Ltd.)
尺寸：0
等级：B
分类：民用

凭借闪电之力有限公司内部设计的"离子巨浪"拥有令人难以置信的技术帮助您自信地勇攀高峰而不用有过热的烦恼。

jennet.name: Jennet
jennet.description: Juno Starwerk's foray into vehicle power plants begins with the Jennet. While not as highly-rated as similar components, the company's reputation for dependability and ease of maintenance still make it a favorite in some circles.
jennet.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：0
等级：D
分类：工业

朱诺星际工厂涉足载具发电机始于詹妮特。该公司虽然不如同类组件广受好评，但其在可靠性和易维护性方面的声誉仍使其在这些领域倍受青睐。

js-300.name: JS-300
js-300.description: This high-end, military-grade component from A&R delivers excellent performance and solid durability at the expense of slightly increased emission levels. However with the JS-300 pedigree, it's easy to see why this small power plant has many fans in the military.
js-300.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：亚蒙里斯 (Amon & Reese Co.)
尺寸：1
等级：A
分类：军用

亚蒙里斯公司的这种高端军用级部件具有出色的性能和坚固的耐用性，但排放水平略有升高。但是，有了JS-300的血统，就很容易看出为什么这款小型发电机在军队中有很多粉丝。

js-400.name: JS-400
js-400.description: As the UEE's oldest energy weapon manufacturer, A&R expanded into power plants to interface more efficiently with their weapons. The JS-400 was their first attempt at a medium power plant, and it's a testament to the quality of this military-grade component that it's still around.
js-400.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：亚蒙里斯 (Amon & Reese Co.)
尺寸：2
等级：A
分类：军用

作为UEE最古老的能量武器制造商，亚蒙里斯公司扩展业务到发电机，以更有效地与武器进行交互。JS-400是他们在中型发电机中的首次尝试，这证明了这种仍在生产中的军用级组件的质量可靠。

js-500.name: JS-500
js-500.description: The JS-500 is A&R's best performing large power plant. This military-grade component receives consistent praise from users both in the military and civilian market.
js-500.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：亚蒙里斯 (Amon & Reese Co.)
尺寸：3 
等级：A 
分类：军用

JS-500是亚蒙里斯公司性能最好的大型发电机。这个军用级组件在军用和民用市场上都受到了用户的一致好评。

lightblossom.name: LightBlossom
lightblossom.description: Featuring stylish design and strong performance, the LightBlossom is a worthy addition to Sakura Sun's line-up, continuing the reputation the conglomerate has for making everything and making it well.
lightblossom.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：樱日集团 (Sakura Sun)
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：民用

"光绽"拥有时尚的设计和强大的性能，是樱日集团产品中的精品，延续了该企业集团在制造一切并使其变得完美方面所享有的声誉。

lotus.name: Lotus
lotus.description: When it comes to medium sized, civilian power plants Whitley's Guide continues to rate the Lotus highly. Few can touch this Sakura Sun component when it comes to both performance and durability.
lotus.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：樱日集团 (Sakura Sun)
尺寸：2
等级：A
分类：民用

当讨论到中型的，民用的发电机时，惠特利指南一如既往的给予莲花很高的评价。在性能和耐用性方面，很少有竞品可以与这款樱日集团出品的组件相提并论。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

lumacore.name: LumaCore
lumacore.description: Among small power plants, ACOM's LumaCore consistently ranks among the best for its power rate, cool rate, and high overheat temperature. That's why if you value your ship's performance over anything else, this competition-grade component is perfect for you.
lumacore.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：ACOM
尺寸：1
等级：A
分类：竞赛

在小型发电机中，ACOM的亮度核心在功率，冷却速率和过热温度方面一直名列前茅。因此，如果您把飞船的性能看的比其他任何东西都更重，那么这个竞赛级别的组件非常适合您。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

luxcore.name: LuxCore
luxcore.description: Famous for performance that laps the competition, the LuxCore provides all the speed your ship needs. You'll leave other medium power plants in the dust with this first-class component from the racing experts at ACOM.
luxcore.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：ACOM 
尺寸：2 
等级：A 
分类：竞赛

照度核心以其在竞赛中独树一帜的性能而著称，可提供飞船所需的全部速度。使用ACOM赛车专家的一流组件，其他发电机用户只配看你的尾灯。

maelstrom.name: Maelstrom
maelstrom.description: This military-grade component has been put through the paces by the UEE Navy, so you know the Maelstrom can handle the havoc of battle.
maelstrom.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：军用

UEE海军已经逐步采用了这种军用级组件，因此您知道大漩涡可以应付浩劫级的战斗。

magnabloom.name: MagnaBloom
magnabloom.description: The MagnaBloom power plant achieves above average performance and durability with minimal excess emissions, making it another exquisitely designed component from Sakura Sun.
magnabloom.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：樱日集团 (Sakura Sun)
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：民用

"大盛"发电机的性能和耐用性均超过了平均水平，并具有极低的过量排放，是樱日集团另一个设计精美的组件。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

mauler-power-plant.name: Mauler Power Plant
mauler-power-plant.description: The Vanduul Mauler's built-in Power Plant generates enough energy for the operation of essential systems, even in heavy combat.
mauler-power-plant.description_zh: 即使在激烈的战斗中，剜度 重拳内置的发电机也能产生足够的能量，以维持关键系统的运行。

megaflux.name: MegaFlux
megaflux.description: Repeated requests from military veterans to make the MegaFlux commercially available convinced A&R Co. to release this large power plant to the public.
megaflux.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：亚蒙里斯 (Amon & Reese Co.)
尺寸：3
等级：B
分类：军用

退伍军人一再要求将"巨大流量"商业化销售，这最终说服了亚蒙里斯公司向公众开放这个大型发电机。

newdawn.name: NewDawn
newdawn.description: The NewDawn was appropriately named, as it was the first large power plant built by Sakura Sun. Following its commercial success, the company decided to expand and improve upon their line of large power plants.
newdawn.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：樱日集团 (Sakura Sun)
尺寸：3
等级：C
分类：民用

"曙光"的命名很恰当，因为它是樱日集团制造的第一台大型电源。在获得商业上的成功之后，该公司决定扩大和改进他们的大型发电机生产线。

overdrive.name: OverDrive
overdrive.description: Amon & Reese knows from years of experience just how hard the military can push their ships. Their OverDrive power plant was designed from the ground up to not only handle those tough conditions with less overheating, but to provide the same dependability and power to civilians as well.
overdrive.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：亚蒙里斯 (Amon & Reese Co.)
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：军用

亚蒙里斯公司从多年与军方的合作中明白，军方会想尽一切办法提升他们的飞船。他们的"过载驱动"电源从基础开始经过重新设计，不仅能以更低的过载损伤应对极端情况，而且还能为普通百姓提供可靠的动力。

powerbolt.name: PowerBolt
powerbolt.description: The PowerBolt provides all the power and performance you need for your journey through the stars. You can trust Lightning Power to get you there.
powerbolt.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：闪电之力有限公司 (Lightning Power Ltd.)
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：民用

电力栓提供您穿越星空时所需的所有动力和性能。您可以信任闪电之力能带您到达那里。

quadracell.name: QuadraCell
quadracell.description: Few military-grade power plants get better than the Aegis QuadraCell. It wasn't just built to survive the heat of battle, it was built to thrive in it.
quadracell.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：1
等级：A
分类：军用

很少有军用级发电机能比圣盾动力的四相电池更好。它不仅是为在激烈的战斗中生存而设计的，而且还准备在其中发展壮大。

quadracell-mt.name: QuadraCell MT
quadracell-mt.description: An Aegis intern crafted the initial design for the QuadraCell MT power plant, inspiring a phrase often heard around their office, "Fresh eyes bring fresh innovation." This military-grade component still outperforms any other medium power plant they make.
quadracell-mt.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：2
等级：A
分类：军用

圣盾的一名实习生为四相电池Mt发电机贡献了最初的设计，产生了他们在办公室经常听到的一句话“新眼光带来新创新。”这个军用级组件仍然胜过他们制造的任何其他中型发电机。

quadracell-mx.name: QuadraCell MX
quadracell-mx.description: Aegis engineers set out to create a power plant that could deliver the performance and durability needed during prolonged engagements. The QuadraCell MX was the result. This large power plant received years of strenuous field testing before finally becoming available to the public.
quadracell-mx.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：3
等级：A
分类：军用

圣盾工程师开始着手创建一个能够在长期交战期间提供所需的性能和耐久性的发电机。结果就是四相电池MX。这款大型发电机经过多年苛刻的实地测试，最终才向公众公开售卖。

radiance.name: Radiance
radiance.description: Considering its extensive and extremely diverse line of products, it's incredible that Sakura Sun can maintain such quality and consistency. The Radiance power plant is a perfect example. A staple of their product line for years, the Radiance has won multiple consumer awards for its reliability and overall performance.
radiance.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：樱日集团 (Sakura Sun)
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：民用

考虑到其广泛而多样的产品线，樱日集团能长期保持这种高质量产品是十分令人吃惊的。"光辉"发电机就是樱日集团高质量产品中一个很好的例子。作为他们的产品线的主要产品，"光辉"的可靠性和整体性能赢得了多个消费者奖项。

radix-2.name: Radix
radix-2.description: With more than enough get up and go to handle your vehicle's daily energy needs, the Radix from Lightning Power Ltd. is a power plant you can count on to get you where you're going.
radix-2.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：闪电之力有限公司 (Lightning Power Ltd.)
尺寸：0
等级：C
分类：民用

闪电之力有限公司提供的"基数"具有足够的能量供应，可满足您飞船的日常所需，您可以依靠它来实现自己的梦想。

radix.name: Radix
radix.description: With more than enough get up and go to handle your vehicle's daily energy needs, the Radix from Lightning Power Ltd. is a power plant you can count on to get you where you're going.
radix.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：闪电之力有限公司 (Lightning Power Ltd.)
尺寸：0
等级：C
分类：民用

闪电之力有限公司提供的"基数"具有足够的能量供应，可满足您飞船的日常所需，您可以依靠它来实现自己的梦想。

regulus.name: Regulus
regulus.description: The Regulus is the power plant you can count on when everyone is counting on you. Made to exceed exacting military standards, Aegis' design team has made sure that you have the extra power you need, when you need it most.
regulus.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：军用

雷古勒斯是每个人都可以依靠的发电机。以超过了严格的军事标准制造，圣盾动力的设计团队确保在您最需要的时候得到所需的额外能量。

reliance.name: Reliance
reliance.description: Haulers have been a fan of the Reliance power plant for years. The component's clean design and Juno Starwerk's lauded customer support have made this power plant a fixture on ships around the Empire.
reliance.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：3
等级：B
分类：工业

很多搬运工多年来一直是"信赖"发电机的粉丝.这个组件整洁的设计，加上朱诺星际工厂备受赞誉的客户支持，使这个电源成为帝国境内很多飞船的固定设备。

roughneck.name: Roughneck
roughneck.description: For its class, the Roughneck power plant from Juno Starwerk is an ideal component for haulers looking for maximum performance.
roughneck.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：1
等级：D
分类：工业

就同级别产品而言，朱诺星际工厂的"莽夫"发电机是运货商所寻求最强性能的理想飞船配件。

sedulity.name: Sedulity
sedulity.description: When you need a power plant that's as reliable as you are, then snag yourself a Sedulity. This component has been a staple of the Juno Starwerk line for years, making it truly worthy of the name.
sedulity.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：工业

当你需要一个像你一样可靠的发电机时，"勤奋"是你最好的选择。多年来，该组件一直是朱诺星际工厂的主打产品，而它也从未让人们失望。

slipstream.name: Slipstream
slipstream.description: Tyler Design & Tech uses an expensive alloy on its Slipstream power plant to reduce its overall emissions. This design choice is key to making this small power plant's detectable signature one of the lowest on the market.
slipstream.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：泰勒设计与技术公司
尺寸：1
等级：A
分类：隐形

泰勒设计与技术公司在其"尾流"发电机中使用了昂贵的合金，以减少总体排放。这项关键设计使得这款小型电源成为市场上出售的最难被探测到几款发电机之一。

smartgen.name: SmartGen
smartgen.description: The no-frills SmartGen is A&R's entry-level large power plant that delivers solid performance for the price.
smartgen.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：亚蒙里斯 (Amon & Reese Co.)
尺寸：3
等级：D
分类：军用

无任何多余装饰的"智能驱动"是亚蒙里斯公司的入门级大型发电机，有很高的性价比。

solarflare.name: SolarFlare
solarflare.description: The ACOM team took their years of experience in the racing world and applied it to their component designs. That focus has helped make the SolarFlare a popular power plant among pilots that want to prioritize performance.
solarflare.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：ACOM
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：竞赛

ACOM团队把他们在赛车界的多年经验应用在他们的组件设计中。这使太阳耀斑发电机受到那些优先考虑性能的飞行员们热爱。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

soniclite.name: SonicLite
soniclite.description: Constructed from the ground up to minimize your heat signature, Tyler Design's SonicLite power plant has gained a following among pilots who appreciate a subtler approach.
soniclite.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：泰勒设计与技术公司
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：隐形

从开始建造时就为了最小化热量信号特征，泰勒设计的轻音发电机在喜欢隐秘行事的驾驶员中已经成为潮流.

sparkjet.name: SparkJet
sparkjet.description: The SparkJet is a basic power plant from Lighting Power Ltd. that strives to balance heat and EM emissions with overall performance and durability.
sparkjet.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：闪电之力有限公司 (Lightning Power Ltd.)
尺寸：2
等级：D
分类：民用

"火花机"是闪电之力有限公司的基本型发电机，致力于在热量和电磁辐射排放与总体性能和耐用性之间取得平衡。

sparkjet-pro.name: SparkJet Pro
sparkjet-pro.description: Looking to upgrade your power plant on a budget? Lightning Power Ltd's SparkJet Pro gives you reliability across the board, making it a solid choice to get you out and flying.
sparkjet-pro.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：闪电之力有限公司 (Lightning Power Ltd.)
尺寸：3
等级：D
分类：民用

是否希望在预算内升级发发电机？闪电之力有限公司的火花机 Pro为您提供全方位的可靠性保障，使其成为送您上路和起飞的可靠选择。

starburn.name: StarBurn
starburn.description: The StarBurn power plant is another excellent addition to the ACOM line of components. This medium-sized component delivers solid performance without overheating, so you won't risk burning your hands while making important repairs on the fly.
starburn.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：ACOM 
尺寸：2 
等级：B 
分类：竞速

星火发电机是ACOM组件系列的又一个出色补充。这种中等尺寸的组件可提供稳定的性能且不会过热，因此在进行重要维修时没有烫手的风险。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

starheart.name: StarHeart
starheart.description: Four generations of racing knowledge and know-how are behind ACOM's StarHeart power plant. Known for its rapid power distribution, the StarHeart has become a favorite among speedsters.
starheart.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：ACOM
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：竞赛

ACOM的星心发电机的背后是四代人的赛车知识和技术。星心以其快速的功率分配而著称，已成为极端速度爱好者的最爱。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

steadfast.name: Steadfast
steadfast.description: When the road ahead is long, Juno Starwerk's Steadfast power plant is there to see you and your vehicle through to the end by providing on-demand power and durability.
steadfast.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：0
等级：C
分类：工业

面对前方漫长的道路，朱诺星际工厂的"坚定"发电机将为您和您的载具提供您所需的能量和耐用性。

stellate.name: Stellate
stellate.description: Sakura Sun worked with Origin to fine tune the Stellate into the perfect power plant for the 890 Jump, providing the power and performance necessary for a ship of such grand design.
stellate.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：樱日集团 (Sakura Sun)
尺寸：4
等级：量身定制
分类：民用

樱日集团携手起源一同将星状引擎调教为最适合890跃动的发电机，为如此宏大规模的飞船提供必需的电力及性能。

stellate-2.name: Stellate
stellate-2.description: Sakura Sun worked with Origin to fine tune the Stellate into the perfect power plant for the 890 Jump, providing the power and performance necessary for a ship of such grand design.
stellate-2.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：樱日集团 (Sakura Sun)
尺寸：4
等级：量身定制
分类：民用

樱日集团携手起源一同将星状引擎调教为最适合890跃动的发电机，为如此宏大规模的飞船提供必需的电力及性能。

sunflare.name: SunFlare
sunflare.description: Harness the power of a star with this high performance power plant from ACOM. Ideal for racers and those who seek speed.
sunflare.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：ACOM
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：竞赛

借助来自ACOM的高性能发电机来利用恒星的力量。赛车手和追求速度之人的理想选择。

superdrive.name: SuperDrive
superdrive.description: A&R's award winning customer service sets the SuperDrive apart from other military power plants in its class. Consumers love that they can depend on both the component and company when the going gets tough.
superdrive.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：亚蒙里斯 (Amon & Reese Co.)
尺寸：3
等级：C
分类：军用

亚蒙里斯公司屡获殊荣的客户服务使超级驱动与同类其他军用发电机拉开差距。消费者喜爱当情况变糟时依靠靠谱的组件和公司。

tigerlilly.name: TigerLilly
tigerlilly.description: The Sakura Sun engineer leading the design for this large power plant named it after his cat, claiming she was the only family member awake when he got home from work every night. The component does its namesake justice by receiving rave reviews for its reliability.
tigerlilly.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：樱日集团 (Sakura Sun)
尺寸：3
等级：A
分类：民用

负责它的樱日集团设计师以他的猫的名字来命名这款组件，设计师声称这猫咪是他每天晚上下班回家时能看到的唯一是醒着的家人。正如其名，这款组件以其强大的可靠性而广受好评。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

trommel.name: Trommel
trommel.description: Utilitarian to its core, the Trommel's lack of frills has made the power plant a favorite of mechanics around the Empire.
trommel.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：2
等级：D
分类：工业

根据朱诺星际工厂的说法，好的工业设计注定会被忽视，但很难不惊叹于热那亚中级发电机，因为其出色的性能和耐用性使其成为一流的组件。

turbodrive.name: TurboDrive
turbodrive.description: The TurboDrive is a common military-grade power plant from A&R that slightly favors performance over durability and stealth.
turbodrive.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：亚蒙里斯 (Amon & Reese Co.)
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：军用

"涡轮驱动"是来自亚蒙里斯公司的普通军用级发电机，它更看重性能而不是耐用性和隐身效果。

ultraflux.name: UltraFlux
ultraflux.description: Initially designed under a military contract, A&R's UltraFlux medium power plant decimated the required performance milestones and enjoyed a storied career as a dependable military asset. When the military's exclusive rights to this high quality component lapsed, A&R eagerly released this to the commercial market.
ultraflux.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：亚蒙里斯 (Amon & Reese Co.)
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：军用

亚蒙里斯公司的终极流量中型发电机最初是根据军事合约设计的，它是降低所需的性能的里程碑，并享有可靠的军事级的优点。当军方对这一高质量部件的专用权失效时，亚蒙里斯公司急切地将其投放到了商业市场。

vortex.name: Vortex
vortex.description: Turn the tide of battle with the Aegis Vortex. Counted on by the UEE Navy, this power plant can be found on ships defending every corner of the universe.
vortex.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：2
等级：D
分类：军用

圣盾 涡流是战斗中的潮流。依靠UEE海军，这款发电机可以在那些捍卫宇宙各个角落的飞船上找到。

whiterose.name: WhiteRose
whiterose.description: Pull incredible performance from the WhiteRose. This small power plant from Sakura Sun shines when generating the kind of power that leaves the other small power plants in its wake.
whiterose.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：樱日集团 (Sakura Sun)
尺寸：1
等级：A
分类：民用

从白玫上获得令人惊叹的性能吧.这个来自樱日集团的小型发电机的性能令竞品相形见绌。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

zapjet.name: ZapJet
zapjet.description: The Lightning Power ZapJet is an ideal streamlined package perfect for anybody who wants a straightforward no-fuss power solution.
zapjet.description_zh:
物品类型：发电机
制造商：闪电之力有限公司 (Lightning Power Ltd.)
尺寸：1
等级：D
分类：民用

闪电之力有限公司的活力飞机是理想的组件，完美适合希望直接使用傻瓜式发电机解决方案的任何人。

5ca-akura.name: 5CA 'Akura'
5ca-akura.description: Behring's belief in balanced shield design is evident with the 5CA. This large shield generator is equally focused on providing acceptable shield health along with decent damage absorption.
5ca-akura.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：贝林财团 (Behring) 
尺寸：3
等级：C
分类：民用

贝林对于平衡护盾各项能力的设计理念在5CA这款护盾生成器上得到了优秀的体现.这款大尺寸护盾生成器同时兼备了足够的护盾生命值和优秀的伤害吸收能力。

5ma-chimalli.name: 5MA 'Chimalli'
5ma-chimalli.description: Thanks to Behring's expert engineers, the 5MA 'Chimalli' shield generator balances the need for a solid regeneration rate with dependable damage absorption.
5ma-chimalli.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：贝林财团 (Behring)
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：民用

得益于贝林财团的专业工程技术，5MA '希马尔利'型护盾生成器很好地在"高效的重充能速度"和”可靠的伤害吸收能力“之间找到了一个良好的平衡。

5sa-rhada.name: 5SA 'Rhada'
5sa-rhada.description: The 5SA 'Rhada' delivers Behring's expert engineering and trusted performance to make it a worthy shield generator for any commercial ship.
5sa-rhada.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：贝林财团 (Behring)
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：民用

这款5SA '拉达'型护盾生成器能够有着贝林的专业工程设计和值得信任的表现. 对于任何商用船，这款护盾都是一个值得考虑的选择。

6ca-bila.name: 6CA 'Bila'
6ca-bila.description: "Built by Behring" is a phrase synonymous with quality. That's why so many around the Empire trust their 6CA 'Bila' large shield generator to provide them with solid performance, impressive durable, and an acceptable degree of stealth.
6ca-bila.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：贝林财团 (Behring)
尺寸：3
等级：B
分类：民用

贝林建造是高质量的同义词。这就是为什么帝国境内如此众多的人相信他们的6CA "比拉"大型护盾生成器能够为他们提供可靠的性能，令人印象深刻的耐用性以及隐蔽程度的原因。

6ma-kozane.name: 6MA 'Kozane'
6ma-kozane.description: Behring's ironclad reputation is almost as impenetrable as the shield produced by the 6MA 'Kozane'. If it's good enough for Behring, it's good enough for you.
6ma-kozane.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：贝林财团 (Behring)
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：民用

贝林财团的坚实名声与6MA"科赞"护盾一样坚不可摧。贝林财团财团的强大就是您的强大。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

6sa-arbiter.name: 6SA 'Arbiter'
6sa-arbiter.description: Providing above average shield health and damage absorption, the 6SA 'Arbiter' has been a trusted component for centuries. Experience the Behring advantage by installing this small shield generator today.
6sa-arbiter.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：贝林财团 (Behring)
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：民用

6SA"阿比特"提供的护盾量和伤害吸收均超过平均水平，几个世纪以来一直是值得信赖的组件。现在就安装此小型护盾生成器体验贝林财团带来的优势吧。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

7ca-nargun.name: 7CA 'Nargun'
7ca-nargun.description: Commercial-grade shield generators don't get any better than the 7CA 'Nargun'. The component utilizes Behring's patented 'Freeze Flow' tech to keep its heat signature in check while increasing both its overall performance and durability.
7ca-nargun.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：贝林财团 (Behring)
尺寸：3
等级：A
分类：民用

商业用的护盾生成器中没有比7CA "纳尔贡"更好的了。该组件利用贝林财团的" 冷冻流"专利技术来控制其热信号，同时提高整体性能和耐用性。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

7ma-lorica.name: 7MA 'Lorica'
7ma-lorica.description: Trust a component that has been equipped on crafts for centuries - the 7MA 'Lorica'. Experience Behring's top-of-the-line shield generator on your ship today.
7ma-lorica.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：贝林财团 (Behring)
尺寸：2
等级：A
分类：民用

请信任这一已经使用了数百年之久的飞船设备：7MA"洛丽卡"。今天，就来体验贝林财团的顶级护盾生成器吧。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

7sa-concord.name: 7SA 'Concord'
7sa-concord.description: A top-of-the-line shield generator that runs loud and proud. What it sacrifices in stealth it more than makes up for with supreme durability and excellent performance. So, even if enemies see you coming, they'll have a hard time disabling Behring's 7SA 'Concord'.
7sa-concord.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：贝林财团 (Behring)
尺寸：1
等级：A
分类：民用

一流的护盾生成器在运行时声音高昂且自豪。它在隐形方面的牺牲换来了了它极强的耐用性和卓越的性能。因此，即使敌人发现了你，他们也很难击穿贝林财团的7SA"康科德"。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

allstop-2.name: AllStop
allstop-2.description: Gorgon Defender Industries first created the AllStop shield generator to hold off the Vanduul. They worked so well that many military crafts were known to prefer the AllStop. Just one of the many reasons to have one on your ship.
allstop-2.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：戈贡防御工业 (Gorgon Defender Industries)
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：军用

最初戈贡设计这款"全面停滞"型护盾生成器是为了抵御剜度氏族的袭击.由于这款"全面停滞"型护盾生成器的优秀实力，许多军用舰船都以这款护盾作为首选.不过这也仅仅是许多让你选用这个护盾的众多理由中的一个而已。

allstop.name: AllStop
allstop.description: Gorgon Defender Industries first created the AllStop shield generator to hold off the Vanduul. They worked so well that many military crafts were known to prefer the AllStop. Just one of the many reasons to have one on your ship.
allstop.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：戈贡防御工业 (Gorgon Defender Industries)
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：军用

最初戈贡设计这款"全面停滞"型护盾生成器是为了抵御剜度氏族的袭击.由于这款"全面停滞"型护盾生成器的优秀实力，许多军用舰船都以这款护盾作为首选.不过这也仅仅是许多让你选用这个护盾的众多理由中的一个而已。

armada.name: Armada
armada.description: Basilisk started by making cutting edge hull plating that was renowned for being durable and dependable. Today they carry on that proud legacy with industrial shield generators like the Armada.
armada.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：毒蜥公司 (Basilisk)
尺寸：2
等级：D
分类：工业

毒蜥公司最先采用了尖端的设备电镀技术，使其一直以来都以耐用和可靠而闻名。如今，他们的"舰队"等工业型护盾生成器继承了这一引以为傲的传统。

armor.name: ARMOR
armor.description: ARMOR is Seal Corps' top-of-the-line shield generator. It was used extensively by the military prior to its shield tech being declassified for civilian use.
armor.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：密封公司
尺寸：3
等级：B
分类：民用

"盔甲"是密封公司顶级的护盾生成器在它的护盾技术被解密为民用技术之前，它已被军方广泛的使用。

aspis.name: Aspis
aspis.description: Basilisk's Aspis industrial shield generator features durable design and reliable performance, earning it a place on Whitley's Guide 'Best Buy' list.
aspis.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：毒蜥公司 (Basilisk)
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：工业

毒蜥公司生产的"重盾"型护盾生成器拥有持久的高性能和可靠的表现，让它在惠特利指南的"最畅销产品"中占领了一席之地。

bamoty.name: Bamoty
bamoty.description: The Bamoty is Yorm's take on a commercial style shield generator. This medium-sized component has won the company a wider fanbase because it expertly balances performance, durability, and stealth.
bamoty.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：约姆公司 (Yorm)
尺寸：2
等级：D
分类：竞赛

巴莫蒂是约姆公司的一款具有商业风格的护盾生成器。该中型部件在性能，耐用性和隐身性方面达到了专业级的平衡，从而获得了公司的广泛支持。

barbican.name: Barbican
barbican.description: Barricade your ship against external forces with the Basilisk Barbican. Originally fabricated for large industrial vessels, this shield generator has became quite popular due to its high damage absorption.
barbican.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：毒蜥公司 (Basilisk)
尺寸：3
等级：B
分类：工业

毒蜥公司"外堡"使您的飞船得以免受外力的干扰。这种护盾生成器最初是为大型工业飞船制造的，由于其极强的伤害吸收能力而备受青睐。

bloc.name: BLOC
bloc.description: Seal Corporation's BLOC shield generator was the first to use the company's revolutionary quantum core semiconductor to reduce the component's power draw without compromising performance.
bloc.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：密封公司
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：民用

密封公司的“集团”护盾生成器首次使用了革命性的量子半导体核心，使其可以在性能不减的同时减少该组件的电力需求。

bulwark.name: Bulwark
bulwark.description: The Bulwark shield generator provides industrial-grade durability and increased performance, but at the expense of a higher emission level.
bulwark.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：毒蜥公司 (Basilisk)
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：工业

这款"堡垒"型护盾生成器能够提供工业级的防护耐久性和增强的护盾表现，但代价是比同类产品更高的被探测性。

castra.name: Castra
castra.description: When performance meets price for vehicle shield generators, the Castra is the clear winner. It has been a Whitley's Guide "Best Buy" for five consecutive years.
castra.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：毒蜥公司 (Basilisk)
尺寸：0
等级：C
分类：工业

如果你在考虑一个物美价廉的护盾生成器，那么这款"营地"型护盾生成器便是你的不二之选.它已经连续五年被评为惠特利指南的"最畅销产品"之一。

citadel.name: Citadel
citadel.description: Fortify your ship with Basilisk's Citadel shield generator. Tailored toward industrial vessels, the component emits a robust and reliable shield.
citadel.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：毒蜥公司 (Basilisk)
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：工业

使用毒蜥公司的"要塞"护盾生成器强化您的飞船。该组件面向工业飞船，致力于生产最坚固可靠的护盾。

cloak.name: Cloak
cloak.description: Discreet security is within your reach thanks to this small shield generator from Ascension Astro. With a lower signature then many other generators in its class, the Cloak provides protection without drawing unnecessary attention.
cloak.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：上升航天 (Ascension Astro)
尺寸：1
等级：D
分类：隐形

多亏了上升航天制造的这款小型护盾生成器，无处不在的隐形安保服务可以随时来到你的身边.得益于相对其他护盾生成器更低的可探测性，"斗篷"型护盾生成器可以在不引起不必要的注意的同时为你提供安全保障。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

coverall.name: CoverAll
coverall.description: Don't sacrifice performance for durability. Get both with Gorgon Defender Industries' CoverAll shield generator.
coverall.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：戈贡防御工业 (Gorgon Defender Industries)
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：军用

有时你不得不为了耐用而选择牺牲性能。但戈贡防御工业的"全面覆盖"选择两者兼得。

falco.name: Falco
falco.description: Falco is the perfect shield generator for those always on the go. Its lightweight build won't hurt your top speed, while still being able to absorb enough damage for you to make your escape.
falco.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：约姆公司 (YORM)
尺寸：1
等级：D
分类：竞赛

"法尔科"护盾生成器是竞速选手的不二之选.它的低重量不会影响你的飞船的最高速度，同时还能吸收足够的伤害帮助你逃离危险。

forcewall.name: ForceWall
forcewall.description: Want to stay in the thick of battle a bit longer? Gorgon's ForceWall is a military-grade shield generator that's able to absorb more damage, providing a notable uptick to your shield's durability.
forcewall.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：戈贡防御工业 (Gorgon Defender Industries)
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：军用

想在这场恶战中撑得久一些吗?来自戈贡防御工业的"防御之墙"型护盾生成器作为一个军用级的发生器，它能够吸收比同级别护盾更多的伤害，使护盾耐久性有了显著的提升。

fr-66.name: FR-66
fr-66.description: The FR-66 is one of the most versatile small shield generator currently on the market. Get military strength protection and performance from Gorgon Defender Industries to ensure your ship can survive any onslaught.
fr-66.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：戈贡防御工业 (Gorgon Defender Industries)
尺寸：1
等级：A
分类：军用

FR-66是目前市场上功能最全的小型护盾生成器之一。戈贡防御工业提供给您军事级别的防护和性能，以确保您的飞船能够在任何攻击下幸存。

fr-76.name: FR-76
fr-76.description: Refined by years of extensive, real world testing by the military, Gorgon Defender Industries FR-76 is the ultimate shield generator. Perfect for everyone from folks defending the frontline to those exploring the frontier.
fr-76.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：戈贡防御工业 (Gorgon Defender Industries)
尺寸：2
等级：A
分类：军用

经过军方多年的实地测试与不断完善，戈贡防御工业的"FR-76"是护盾生成器的顶点。从捍卫前线士兵到保护远行探索的旅人，"FR-76"都是他们完美的选择。

fr-86.name: FR-86
fr-86.description: Gorgon's FR-86 is tried, tested, and trusted. No other large shield generator delivers both exceptional performance and durability to this degree.
fr-86.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：戈贡防御工业 (Gorgon Defender Industries)
尺寸：3
等级：A
分类：军用

"FR-86"经过一系列复杂的考核，测试后深受广大买家们的信赖。没有其他任何同类型的大型护盾生成器能提供如此卓越的性能与坚实的耐用性。

fullblock.name: FullBlock
fullblock.description: Crafted by former residents of Caliban, Gorgon's FullBlock large shield generator has been repeatedly put to the test by members of the military and public. That means you can count on it regardless of what you come up against.
fullblock.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：戈贡防御工业 (Gorgon Defender Industries)
尺寸：3
等级：B
分类：军用

戈贡防御工业的"完全格挡"大型护盾最早是戈贡防御工业面向民用市场制造的，但如今它已经通过了军事和公众的多次考验。这意味着无论遇到什么挑战，您都可以依靠它。

fullstop.name: FullStop
fullstop.description: Featuring proprietary recoil tech, the FullStop shield generator was built to better absorb attacks from a multitude of damage types.
fullstop.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：戈贡防御工业 (Gorgon Defender Industries)
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：军用

搭载了持有专利的反推科技，这款"完全停滞"型护盾生成器能够在复杂的受击环境下更好的吸收伤害。

glacis.name: Glacis
glacis.description: Origin turned to the experts at Basilisk to build a bespoke shield generator for the 890 Jump. The Glacis blends centuries of cutting edge innovation to produce a strong and stable shield capable of defending the valuable ship and passengers aboard.
glacis.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：毒蜥公司 (Basilisk)
尺寸：4
等级：定制
分类：工业

起源公司向毒蜥公司为890跃进专门定制的护盾生成器.这款"斜堤"型护盾生成器结合了长达几个世纪中的最前沿科技技术创新，最终成就了这一款强大而又稳定的护盾，能够为价值连城的飞船及船上的乘客提供完善的保护。

glacis-2.name: Glacis
glacis-2.description: Origin turned to the experts at Basilisk to build a bespoke shield generator for the 890 Jump. The Glacis blends centuries of cutting edge innovation to produce a strong and stable shield capable of defending the valuable ship and passengers aboard.
glacis-2.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：毒蜥公司 (Basilisk)
尺寸：4
等级：定制
分类：工业

起源公司向毒蜥公司为890跃进专门定制的护盾生成器.这款"斜堤"型护盾生成器结合了长达几个世纪中的最前沿科技技术创新，最终成就了这一款强大而又稳定的护盾，能够为价值连城的飞船及船上的乘客提供完善的保护。

guard.name: GUARD
guard.description: Don't be afraid to go up against the unknown with Seal Corp's GUARD. This shield generator balances performance, durability, and stealth to allow the user to utilize the shield in whatever way suits them best.
guard.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：密封公司
尺寸：3
等级：C
分类：民用

面对未知恐惧的最好办法就是配备“守卫”护盾。该护盾生成器以其平衡的性能，耐用性和隐身能力，让用户可以按照最适合自己的方式来使用护盾。

guardian.name: Guardian
guardian.description: Upgrade to the Guardian for increased absorption of ballistic, energy, and distortion damage. Making this industrial shield generator one of the most durable in its class.
guardian.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：毒蜥公司 (Basilisk)
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：工业

经过改进后的"守卫"，能够吸收更多的实弹，能量和扭曲伤害。这使得该工业型护盾生成器成为同类产品中最耐用的一种。

haltur.name: Haltur
haltur.description: Strong shield health and an exceptional generation rate gives the Haltur the best performance ranking of any shield in its class. Beloved by racers and those who prefer to navigate away from danger instead of soaking it up.
haltur.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：约姆公司 (Yorm)
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：竞赛

强大的护盾生命值和超常的充能速度使哈尔图成为同类护盾生成器中的佼佼者。深受赛车手和那些愿意远离危险而非沉溺其中之人的喜爱。

haven.name: HAVEN
haven.description: The HAVEN is an admired shield generator for large ships. Seal Corp's simple, clean design makes repairing the component an easy and affordable task, and has only increased its popularity over the years.
haven.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：密封公司
尺寸：3
等级：D
分类：民用

"避风港"是用于大型飞船饱受敬仰的护盾生成器。密封公司简洁，干净的设计使其部件的维修成为一项简单又便宜的事情，并且让该公司在近几年内更受欢迎。

hex.name: HEX
hex.description: Prepare your ship for any circumstance by installing a HEX from Seal Corporation. Balanced performance and durability make this an ideal, versatile choice for those who don't know where their next adventure may take them.
hex.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：密封公司
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：民用

让你的飞船通过安装“六角”护盾来为任何状况做好准备。均衡的性能和耐用性使其成为那些不知下次冒险将前往何处之人的首要选择。

holdstrong-2.name: Holdstrong
holdstrong-2.description: This capital-class shield generator was designed specifically for the Idris frigate.
holdstrong-2.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：4

这款主力舰级的护盾生成器是专门为伊德里斯级护卫舰设计的。

holdstrong.name: Holdstrong
holdstrong.description: This capital-class shield generator was designed specifically for the Idris frigate.
holdstrong.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：4

这款主力舰级的护盾生成器是专门为伊德里斯级护卫舰设计的。

ink.name: INK
ink.description: When you're looking for a dependable shield, why not trust the company that's been doing it longer than anyone else? Seal Corporation's original INK shield generator has been a staple around the Empire for generations.
ink.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：密封公司
尺寸：1
等级：D
分类：民用

当你在为寻找一款值得依赖的护盾而纠结的时候，何不尝试一下这个护盾行业中起步最早的公司的产品?长年以来，密封公司所产的"墨水"型护盾生成器一直都是帝国中必不可少的一个基础物品。

jaghte.name: Jaghte
jaghte.description: Built with performance in mind, Yorm's Jaghte competition shield generator prioritizes shield health and generation rate over strength and stealth.
jaghte.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：约姆公司 (Yorm)
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：竞赛

以性能为核心设计的贾格特护盾生成器，优先考虑了护盾的生命值和恢复速度，而不是隐身性能和强度。

mauler-shield-generator.name: Mauler Shield Generator
mauler-shield-generator.description: The Mauler's shield generator provides defensive coverage against incoming fire and other threats to the ship.
mauler-shield-generator.description_zh: The Mauler's shield generator provides defensive coverage against incoming fire and other threats to the ship.

mirage.name: Mirage
mirage.description: By boasting a signature so faint most won't believe it's there, Ascension Astro's top of the line small shield generator lives up to its name - Mirage. It's the ultimate component for those who want to go unnoticed.
mirage.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：上升航天 (Ascension Astro)
尺寸：1
等级：A
分类：隐形

通过其低的令人难以置信的信号发散，上升航天的顶级小型盾牌发生器名副其实，即"蜃景"。它是那些渴望隐秘行事的人的终极选择。

obscura.name: Obscura
obscura.description: Respected for its lower emissions, the Obscura shield generator uses an advanced signature dispersal system to help give your ship a quieter signature while still remaining shielded.
obscura.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：上升航天 (Ascension Astro)
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：隐形

"暗黑"护盾生成器以其较低的辐射信号而著称，它使用先进的信号发散系统，可在保持护盾开启的同时使您的飞船保持寂静。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

palisade.name: Palisade
palisade.description: No other small shield generator can match the durability of the Basilisk Palisade. This top-of-the-line industrial component forfeits stealth for the ability to absorb an unrivaled amount of damage.
palisade.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：毒蜥公司 (Basilisk)
尺寸：1
等级：A
分类：工业

小型盾牌发生器中没有可以与毒蜥公司的"栅栏"在耐用性上相提并论的。这种顶级的工业设备完全没有隐身能力，但它可以承受无与伦比的伤害。

parapet.name: Parapet
parapet.description: As the peak of Basilisk's large industrial shield generators, it's easy to see why the Parapet is so beloved. With one of the industry's best shield generation to damage ratio, it's difficult to degrade the shield and expose the hull.
parapet.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：毒蜥公司 (Basilisk)
尺寸：3
等级：A
分类：工业

作为毒蜥公司大型工业护盾生成器的顶峰之作，很容易就能理解为何"护墙"如此受宠爱。凭借业界最佳的护盾回复与伤害吸收能力，很少有人能破开他的防御攻击到船体。

pin.name: PIN
pin.description: With the PIN vehicle shield generator you can now trust Seal Corp to protect you whether you're in space or atmosphere.
pin.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：密封公司 (Seal Corporation)
尺寸：0
等级：C
分类：民用

无论是在宇宙中还是在星球上，这款来自密封公司的"别针"型护盾生成器都是你值得信赖的好伙伴。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

rampart.name: Rampart
rampart.description: Basilisk understands that escape isn't always an option. That's why they built the Rampart industrial shield generator to take an incredible amount of damage before it's depleted.
rampart.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：毒蜥公司 (Basilisk)
尺寸：2
等级：A
分类：工业

毒蜥公司明白逃脱并非总是最好的选择。这就是为什么他们制造出了"城墙"工业型护盾生成器以期望在其护盾能量耗尽之前阻挡难以置信的伤害。

rpel.name: RPEL
rpel.description: See why more people trust Seal Corporation to protect their ship than any other company. With the RPEL shield generator you can be certain you'll be sealed off from danger.
rpel.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：密封公司
尺寸：2
等级：D
分类：民用

看看为什么更多的人相比其他厂商更信任密封公司来保护他们的飞船。有了“击退”护盾生成器，你就可以确定你将会远离危险了。

rs-barrier.name: RS-Barrier
rs-barrier.description: Designed to defend against the debris common during large-scale salvage projects, Aegis Dynamics developed this bespoke industrial shield generator in-house for the Reclaimer.
rs-barrier.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：圣盾动力（Aegis Dynamics）
尺寸：4
等级：定制
分类：工业

为了防御大型打捞项目中常见的碎片，圣盾动力专为回收者设计并自主研发了这款定制的工业护盾生成器。

securehyde.name: SecureHyde
securehyde.description: Get extra protection with the SecureHyde shield generator. This military-grade component provides superior durability over every other shield generator in its class.
securehyde.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：戈贡防御工业 (Gorgon Defender Industries)
尺寸：1
等级：D
分类：军用

当你拥有了"安全隐蔽"型护盾生成器，你就拥有了更多的保护.这款军用级别的护盾生成器能够提供同级别中傲视群雄的超高耐久度。

securescreen.name: SecureScreen
securescreen.description: Gorgon Defender Industries brings military might to their entry-level, large shield generator. Featuring best-in-class durability, the SecureScreen was built to take a beating and survive.
securescreen.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：戈贡防御工业 (Gorgon Defender Industries)
尺寸：3
等级：D
分类：军用

戈贡防御工业将军事级别的力量带入了入门级大型护盾生成器。"安全屏障"具有一流的耐用性，能够助你在各种武装冲突中屹立不倒。

secureshield.name: SecureShield
secureshield.description: Get military-grade protection for your ship with the SecureShield from Gorgon Defender Industries. Their cutting edge emitter tech allows for superior shield absorption across the spectrum of damage types.
secureshield.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：戈贡防御工业 (Gorgon Defender Industries)
尺寸：2
等级：D
分类：军用

使用戈贡防御工业的"安全护盾"带给您的载具军事级的保护。其先进的护盾技术使其可以大幅吸收各种类型的伤害。

sheut.name: Sheut
sheut.description: Keep your shield's heat from giving you away by using a Sheut. Another outstanding stealth shield generator from Ascension Astro.
sheut.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：上升航天 (Ascension Astro)
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：隐形

作为上升航天另一款出色的隐形盾牌发生器。"心影"能最大限度减少你因为护盾辐射而暴露位置的可能性。

shimmer.name: Shimmer
shimmer.description: Ascension Astro is known for one thing - quality stealth components. Their Shimmer shield generator was built not only to help avoid detection, but also provide protection when needed most.
shimmer.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：上升航天 (Ascension Astro)
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：隐形

上升航天因一个东西而闻名 — 极高质量的隐形装置.这款"微光"型护盾生成器不仅仅能够帮助你避开探测，还能够在你最需要的时刻给你提供保护。

shroud.name: Shroud
shroud.description: The Shroud shield generator from Ascension Astro provides a layer of protection for your vessel while still helping you maintain emission levels to provide a lower signature.
shroud.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：上升航天 (Ascension Astro)
尺寸：2
等级：D
分类：隐形

这款"护罩"型护盾生成器可以在为你的飞船提供保护的同时维持较低的可探测性，以减少被发现的可能。

steward.name: Steward
