steward.description: The Steward is Basilisk's entry-level industrial shield generator. Its reinforced housing adds an extra level of durability to an already robust system, guaranteeing that your shield will be projecting even in the harshest conditions.
steward.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：毒蜥公司 (Basilisk)
尺寸：1
等级：D
分类：工业

"管家"是毒蜥公司的入门级工业护盾生成器。它在强大的护盾内部系统的基础上，外壳也有所增强。增强的外壳所提供的更强的耐久性让这款护盾在最极端的环境下仍能正常工作。

stop.name: STOP
stop.description: Utilizing a design that has proven itself time and again, the STOP shield generator by Seal Corporation has featured the same classic design for years due to its consistent, stellar performance.
stop.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：密封公司
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：民用

应用了经过长时间考验的护盾设计和其被证明的持久优秀性能，使得这款"停滞"护盾生成器在保持了这种经典设计的同时仍然能够提供良好的保护。

stronghold.name: Stronghold
stronghold.description: The Stronghold shield generator uses patented hull plating techniques to reinforce the generator's body to make it one of the sturdiest on the market. That means the shield and component are both built to last.
stronghold.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：毒蜥公司 (Basilisk)
尺寸：3
等级：C
分类：工业

这款"据点"型护盾生成器采用了获得专利批准的船体镀层技术以增强发生器本身的强度. 正是这一点让它成为了所有护盾生成器中最坚固耐用的那一款.这代表着这个护盾和它的附属附件都是为了坚持到最后一刻而设计制造的。

sukoran.name: Sukoran
sukoran.description: Good design always survives with the Banu. The Sukoran shield generator updates Tevarin technology in a number of interesting ways. Its efficient design draws less power, while still effectively producing a robust shield capable of absorbing most ballistic and energy attacks until it's fully depleted. However, this greater efficiency comes with a price as the Sukoran's slower regen rate may temporarily render the shield offline.
sukoran.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：巴努 (Banu)
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：军用

巴努一直秉持着优秀设计的理念.这款斯科拉型护盾生成器运用了经过多次改良的塔维因科技.它的高效能设计能够减少能耗，同时还能在被完全击破之前为你提供强大的护盾，可以吸收大部分的动能和能量攻击.然而，强大的高效能护盾设计也有缺点：斯科拉型护盾生成器较慢的护盾恢复速度可能导致暂时的护盾失效。

suldrath.name: Suldrath
suldrath.description: Classic Tevarin tech melds with modern design for the Suldrath shield generator. The Banu beautifully blend the best parts of historic Tevarin shield tech with contemporary upgrades and conveniences expected of this component generation. The result is an effective and unique xeno-crafted shield ready to shroud your ship and protect you from whatever dangers come your way.
suldrath.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：巴努 (Banu)
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：军用

苏得拉斯护盾生成器是经典的塔维因技术，和现代设计结合而成的产物。巴努人完美的将历史悠久的塔维因护盾技术之精髓，进行了现代化的升级，令其更加便利且符合此世代的标准。最终制作出既有效率，又充满异星特色的护盾生成器。时刻准备庇护你的船只，保护你免受任何威胁。

surestop.name: SureStop
surestop.description: Gorgon's SureStop shield generator was initially developed for military applications, aiming for a middle-of-the-road alternative for circumstances that are anything but. Featuring new Envelop projection technology, the SureStop emphasizes performance and dependability over lower signature.
surestop.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：戈贡防御工业 (Gorgon Defender Industries)
尺寸：3
等级：C
分类：军用

戈贡防御工业出品的"必然停滞"型护盾生成器最初是为军用而设计. 此产品的定位是为了应对所有可能发生的极端情况.因为搭载了全新的封装投射技术，较低探测性而言，这款"必然停滞"型发生器可以更加注重其性能和稳定性的表现。

targa.name: Targa
targa.description: Based on Gotlieb Yorm's original design, the Targa is a light, high performance, competition-grade generator that revolutionized racing.
targa.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：约姆公司 (YORM)
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：竞赛

基于戈特利布·约姆的原设计并加以改进，这款"塔尔加"护盾生成器是一款足以颠覆竞速行业的轻量级高效能护盾生成器。

trenta.name: Trenta
trenta.description: An ideal choice for racers looking for a shield generator that provides above average shield performance and durability. As a bonus, the Trenta's casing is constructed out of a magnesium infused alloy which makes the component both sturdy yet lightweight.
trenta.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：约姆公司 (Yorm)
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：竞赛 

一个理想的选择，对于那些想要超出寻常的护盾性能和耐久的赛车手。作为奖励，特伦塔的外壳是由镁合金制成的，这使得组件既坚固又轻便。

umbra.name: Umbra
umbra.description: Slip through the darkness of space like a phantom with the Umbra stealth shield generator. Best when used in conjunction with other low signature components from Ascension Astro.
umbra.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：上升航天 (Ascension Astro)
尺寸：2
等级：A
分类：隐形

借助"本影"隐形盾牌发生器，像幻影一样穿越在太空的黑暗世界中。最好与上升航天的其他低辐射组件结合使用。

veil.name: Veil
veil.description: An advanced cooling system significantly reduces the heat produced by the Veil stealth shield generator. No other component in its class even comes close to rivaling its heat suppression technology.
veil.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：上升航天 (Ascension Astro)
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：隐形

先进的冷却系统大大降低了"面纱"隐形护盾生成器产生的热量。同类产品中没有其他组件可以与它的散热技术媲美。

ward.name: Ward
ward.description: The Ward is Basilisk's basic industrial-grade shield generator for large ships. It provides decent performance and durability while also keeping its signature respectable.
ward.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：毒蜥公司 (Basilisk)
尺寸：3
等级：D
分类：工业

"城壁"是毒蜥公司为大型飞船生产的基础性工业级护盾生成器。它具有出色的性能和耐用性，以及能保持较为可观的辐射排放量。

web.name: WEB
web.description: Tried, tested, and refined for centuries, the WEB shield generator balances sleek design with stellar performance to keep your ship safe under a wide variety of circumstances.
web.description_zh:
物品类型：护盾生成器
制造商：密封公司
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：民用

经过长达几个世纪的测试和升级，这款"蛛网"型护盾生成器很好地平衡了优秀的性能和优美的外形，并且能够在多种环境下保证你的飞船的安全。

agni.name: Agni
agni.description: Haulers have relied on Juno Starwerk's stellar industrial craftsmanship for centuries. The company constantly updates and improves the design of the Agni quantum drive to ensure it remains a top-of-the-line industrial component.
agni.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：3
等级：B
分类：工业

几世纪以来，货运业者们都一直依靠朱诺星际工厂的精美工业制品.公司不断地更新和改善阿格尼量子驱动器的设计来确保它始终是业界顶级的工业部件。

aither.name: Aither
aither.description: Named for an ancient god of light and the heavens, the Aither quantum drive honors its namesake as it ferries people places their ancestors could never imagine. This classic RSI medium-sized component has graced civilian ships for centuries.
aither.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：RSI
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：民用

以古老的光明之神和天堂之名命名，以太量子驱动器以其名字而著称，因为它可以运送人们到前人无法想到的位置。这个经典的RSI中型组件已经加装在民用舰艇中多个世纪。

allegro.name: Allegro
allegro.description: Designed specifically for the 890 Jump, the Allegro quantum drive blends ArcCorp's expertise with Origin's exceptionally high standards, making it the ideal companion for a luxury cruise through the stars.
allegro.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：弧光集团 (ArcCorp)
尺寸：4
等级：量身定制
分类：民用

特别为890跃动而设计，极速量子驱动器结合了弧光集团的专业知识和起源的极端高标准，使它成为您漫步星辰之间的理想陪伴。

atlas.name: Atlas
atlas.description: Though it may seem commonplace today, Humanity's ability to travel across solar systems at quantum speeds was built upon a foundation of Roberts Space Industries' technology and craftsmanship. Now, space travel has reached even higher heights thanks to the top-of-class performance of RSI's Atlas pushing quantum drive technology farther than it's ever gone.
atlas.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：罗伯茨太空工业
尺寸：1
等级：A
分类：民用

尽管如今看来司空见惯，但人类最早在太阳系量子航行的能力是建立在罗伯茨太空工业公司的技术和工艺基础上的。现在，得益于量子驱动器技术得到了深远的发展，罗伯茨太空工业的 "擎天之神"以其一流的性能标志着太空旅行已经达到了全新的高度。

balandin.name: Balandin
balandin.description: Wei-Tek built the Balandin with military and security personnel in mind. Following a series of test runs by veterans, engineers accelerated the spool and calibration times while also improving the component's precision and stability.
balandin.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：未科技
尺寸：3
等级：B
分类：军事

未科技在打造巴兰丁时着重考虑了军事和安全人员。经过老兵们的一系列测试，工程师们加快了充能以及校准时间同时提高了组件的精准度和稳定性。

beacon.name: Beacon
beacon.description: Wei-Tek has made other mil-spec component manufacturers sit up and take notice with the introduction of the highly praised Beacon quantum drive.
beacon.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：未科技
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：军用

未科技通过推出备受赞誉的“信标”量子驱动器，让其他军用规格组件制造商坐下不去了。

bolon.name: Bolon
bolon.description: Don't let lesser craftsmanship put you and your precious cargo at risk. The Bolon industrial quantum drive was built with durability in mind to keep it working when you need it most.
bolon.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：工业

别让那些粗制滥造产品把你和你的货物置于险境.伯龙工业级量子驱动器以耐用性为准则而制造，在你最需要它的时候能保持工作。

bolt.name: Bolt
bolt.description: The RAMP Corporation continues their line of low emission quantum drives with the Bolt. This medium-sized component will blast you from one location to the next while producing a minimal signature.
bolt.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：RAMP公司
尺寸：2 
等级：B
分类：隐形

RAMP公司继续生产雷电作为低排放的量子驱动器。这种中等尺寸的组件将用最小的信号强度让您从一个位置飞到另一位置。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

burst.name: Burst
burst.description: With the Burst quantum drive, ArcCorp has taken their popular Rush model and through streamlined re-engineering, managed to improve upon it.
burst.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：弧光集团 (ArcCorp)
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：民用

弧光集团的"爆发"量子驱动器是在他们最受欢迎的驱动器型号的基础上通过简化设计，进行改进后的版本。

cascade.name: Cascade
cascade.description: The latest medium-sized quantum drive from ArcCorp, the Cascade will confidently carry you to your destination time and time again.
cascade.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：弧光集团 (ArcCorp)
尺寸：2
等级：D
分类：民用

弧光集团最新的中型量子驱动器，喷流可以屡次送您安心地到达您的目的地。

colossus.name: Colossus
colossus.description: Juno Starwerk makes quantum drives that can go the distance and the Colossus is no exception. Though, once you experience its dependable performance for yourself, you might just want to call it exceptional.
colossus.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：工业

朱诺星际工厂制造的量子驱动器非常适合长距离旅行，"巨像"也不例外。因此当您亲身体验到它可靠的性能后，便会毫不犹豫的称赞卓越的性能。

crossfield.name: Crossfield
crossfield.description: Wei-Tek has marketed the Crossfield specifically to target military personnel and veteran pilots who will appreciate the stats that the mil-spec quantum drive offers.
crossfield.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：未科技
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：军用

未科技已将克罗斯菲尔德专门针对军事人员和资深飞行员进行了营销，他们将会欣赏军用量子驱动器提供的统计数据的。

drift.name: Drift
drift.description: Built to keep heat and signature levels low, the Drift quantum drive from RAMP Corporation helps to minimize emissions generated while spooling.
drift.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：RAMP公司
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：隐形

设计以保持热量和信号水平较低，RAMP公司的漂泊量子驱动器有助于最小化充能时产生的排放量。

drifter.name: Drifter
drifter.description: Balancing craftsmanship and cost, the Drifter provides renowned Tarsus performance at an affordable price.
drifter.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：塔苏斯 (Tarsus)
尺寸：3
等级：D
分类：民用

塔苏斯的这款漂流者在价格与工艺之间找到了平衡点，让消费者能够负担得起塔苏斯的招牌性能。

echo.name: Echo
echo.description: ArcCorp carefully crafted and calibrated the Echo into an affordable yet effective quantum drive.
echo.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：弧光集团 (ArcCorp)
尺寸：3
等级：D
分类：民用

弧光集团精心制造并校准了“回声”，使其成为了价格公道、性能优越的量子驱动器。

eos.name: Eos
eos.description: The Eos quantum drive has been a staple in the RSI product line for centuries. Its original design was so perfectly fine-tuned that it has remained basically unchanged since.
eos.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：RSI 
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：民用

黎明女神量子驱动器已成为RSI产品系列的主要产品。其原始设计经过完美的调整，以至于从那时起基本上未有改变。

erebos.name: Erebos
erebos.description: The Erebos exemplifies RSI's commitment to excellence. This high quality quantum drive constantly ranks atop "Best of" lists for both critics and consumers.
erebos.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：RSI
尺寸：3
等级：A
分类：民用

黑暗之神体现了RSI追求卓越的理念。这款高质量的量子驱动器几乎一直在评论家和消费者的"最佳"榜单中名列前茅。

expedition.name: Expedition
expedition.description: Cruise through space confident that your perfectly balanced Expedition quantum drive from Tarsus will get you exactly where you're going.
expedition.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：塔苏斯 (Tarsus)
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：民用

在太空中充满信心地航行，塔苏斯提供的完美平衡的 远征 量子驱动器将为您提供精确的行驶方向。

fissure.name: Fissure
fissure.description: Spool up the Fissure and speed through space with the component ArcCorp claims has successfully completed billions of quantum travels over the centuries.
fissure.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：弧光集团 (ArcCorp)
尺寸：3
等级：C
分类：民用

利用组件给裂隙充能并快速飞跃宇宙，弧光集团声称在过去的几个世纪中已经成功完成了数十亿次量子航行。

flash.name: Flash
flash.description: With improved spooling and calibration, the new ArcCorp Flash drive can get you in and out of quantum easier and faster.
flash.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：弧光集团 (ArcCorp)
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：民用

通过改进多任务缓冲处理和校准系统，弧光集团新的"闪电"驱动器可以使您更轻松，更快速地进入和退出量子状态。

flood.name: Flood
flood.description: Experience the true joy of the journey with the Flood. This small quantum drive from ArcCorp has been a staple around the Empire for years.
flood.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：弧光集团 (ArcCorp)
尺寸：1
等级：D
分类：民用

与溢流一起，体验真正的乐趣。多年以来，弧光集团这款小型量子驱动器已成为整个帝国的主流产品。

foxfire.name: FoxFire
foxfire.description: The FoxFire won't leave a burning trail in your wake, but this quantum drive's strong performance leaves an equal impression. Making it another elegant and powerful component from the folks at Ace Astrogation.
foxfire.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：王牌航天 (Ace Astrogation)
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：竞赛

"狐火"不会留下任何痕迹，但是这种量子驱动器的强大性却能给人留下深刻的印象。这使它成为王牌航天员工的又一个优雅而强大的成果。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

goliath.name: Goliath
goliath.description: The Goliath was designed to be more durable than other quantum drives in its class. That's made it a staple of industrial ship since Humanity first started to explore the stars.
goliath.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：工业

哥利亚被设计得比同类量子驱动器更加耐用.这使得它成为自从人类开始探索星辰时一艘工业用船的主要部分。

hemera.name: Hemera
hemera.description: Designing the Hemera quantum drive has allowed the technicians at Robert Space Industries to push the boundaries of quantum travel technology even further, and allow you to go even farther.
hemera.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：RSI
尺寸：2
等级：A
分类：民用

在设计“白昼女神”量子驱动器的过程中，罗伯茨太空工业的技术人员进一步突破了量子航行技术的极限，使您可以走得更远。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

huracan.name: Huracan
huracan.description: Juno Starwerk understands that your most important job is to keep your cargo safe. That's why their Huracan quantum drive prioritizes interdiction shielding, stability, and damage efficiency above everything else.
huracan.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：工业

朱诺星际工厂十分清楚您最首要的工作是保证您货物的安全。这就是为什么他们研发的“乌拉坎”量子驱动器优先考虑其隐蔽性、稳定性和受损时的可靠性。

hyperion.name: Hyperion
hyperion.description: In honor of the name, the first test flight destination for this popular RSI quantum drive was the similarly named satellite of Saturn.
hyperion.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：RSI 
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：民用

为了纪念这个名字 ，这个备受欢迎的量子驱动器第一次试飞的目的地同样被命名为土星的卫星。

impulse.name: Impulse
impulse.description: Legend claims an inaccurate lathe cut materials thinner than expected on the Impulse prototype. When its test performance exceeded expectations, engineers adopted the changes, and ArcCorp's premiere size three quantum drive was born.
impulse.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：弧光集团 (ArcCorp)
尺寸：3
等级：B
分类：民用

传言指出，不准确的车削材料导致其比脉冲原型预料的要更薄。在测试时其性能超出预期，工程师接受了这些改动，弧光集团的第一款S3的量子驱动器诞生了。

kama.name: Kama
kama.description: The Kama from Juno Starwerk has won more "Fan Favorite" reader's poll from 'Long Haul Quarterly' than any other industrial quantum drive in its class.
kama.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：3
等级：C
分类：工业

来自朱诺星际工厂的卡玛比任何其他工业级量子驱动器赢得的'长途运输季刊'的“粉丝最爱”读者投票都要多。

khaos.name: Khaos
khaos.description: RSI's Khaos has been tuned to provide dependable performance with reliable construction. Once you've got this strapped in, you'll appreciate the order this quantum drive brings to the chaos of travel.
khaos.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：RSI
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：民用

RSI的混沌经过调整将提供可靠的性能及坚实的结构.装上这个把你乱七八糟的旅途安排的明明白白。

lightfire.name: LightFire
lightfire.description: Ace Astrogation built the LightFire for pilots who like to push the edge, but not break the bank. Its focused design provides solid performance at the expense of the component's durability and stealth.
lightfire.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：王牌航天 (Ace Astrogation)
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：竞赛

王牌航天为那些喜欢挑战极限但又囊中羞涩的飞行员专门打造了"光火"。其核心设计是确保稳定的性能，但也因此牺牲了组件的耐用性和隐秘性。

mauler-quantum-drive.name: Mauler Quantum Drive
mauler-quantum-drive.description: This Quantum Drive has been calibrated to allow for the Mauler to undertake long and short quantum travel as well as access jump points.
mauler-quantum-drive.description_zh: 该量子驱动器已经过校准，使重拳能够进行长短距离的量子航行，并可进入跳跃点。

metis.name: Metis
metis.description: There's no room for error when bending space and time to travel incredible distances. So put your trust in RSI, a company that's delivered quality components to the public since the dawn of space flight.
metis.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：RSI
尺寸：3
等级：C
分类：民用

在弯曲时空的漫长路途中没有一丝出错的余地.RSI在人类进入太空之始便开始向公众提供优质产品 900年老字号值得你的信赖。

nova.name: Nova
nova.description: Don't draw attention to yourself with the Nova, which is RAMP Corporation's base, medium-sized stealth quantum drive.
nova.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：RAMP公司
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：隐形

新星不会为你自己吸引目光，它是RAMP公司的基础中型隐形量子驱动器。

odyssey.name: Odyssey
odyssey.description: Adventure amidst the stars awaits with the Odyssey quantum drive. Careful and continued refinement from the Tarsus team has kept this component on the cutting edge for centuries.
odyssey.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：塔苏斯 (Tarsus)
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：民用

与奥德赛量子驱动器一同等待星际冒险。塔苏斯团队细心耐心的完善，使该组件始终是最先进的。

pontes.name: Pontes
pontes.description: When placed under stress tests, the proprietary alloys used by Wei-Tek to build the Pontes proved themselves against competitors in the same class.
pontes.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：未科技
尺寸：3 
等级：C 
分类：军用

在承受压力测试后，未科技用于生产庞特斯的专用合金证明了自己在同等级竞争中的实力。

quest.name: Quest
quest.description: Why mess with perfection? Tarsus has been manufacturing the Quest drive for centuries to provide everyone an affordable medium-sized component to carry them on their adventures.
quest.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：塔苏斯(Tarsus)
尺寸：2
等级：D
分类：民用

何必吹毛求疵?几个世纪以来，塔苏斯一直致力于生产追逐驱动器，以期提供人人都买的起的中等尺寸组件并以此助力人民群众的星际旅行。

ranger.name: Ranger
ranger.description: Rely on the Ranger to guide you through the stars. The quality and reliability of this classic Tarsus quantum drive has made it a ship staple for centuries.
ranger.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：塔苏斯 (Tarsus)
尺寸：3
等级：B
分类：民用

依仗游侠引你穿越星空。这款经典的塔苏斯量子驱动器因其质量和可靠性成为几个世纪以来飞船的首选。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

rush.name: Rush
rush.description: The Rush is a popular commercial quantum drive that lives up to its name.
rush.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：弧光集团 (ArcCorp)
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：民用

突进是一款名副其实的流行款商业化量子驱动器。

siren.name: Siren
siren.description: Recent changes by Wei-Tek to the alloys used in the Siren have improved its performance without sacrificing durability, making it a respectable military-grade quantum drive.
siren.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：未科技
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：军用

未科技最近对“警笛”中使用的合金进行了更改，从而在不牺牲耐用性的情况下提高了其性能，使其成为一款可靠的军用级量子驱动器。

sojourn.name: Sojourn
sojourn.description: When you explore a star system, it should be about the experiences, the sights, the memories. The Tarsus Sojourn quantum drive takes all the worry out of quantum travel so that you can focus on what's important, the journey.
sojourn.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：塔苏斯 (Tarsus)
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：民用

当您探索一个星系时，你应该把精力放在观察，体验和记录上。塔苏斯的"旅居"量子驱动器消除了量子航行中的所有烦恼，因此您可以把精力专注于最重要的旅程上。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

sparkfire.name: SparkFire
sparkfire.description: The SparkFire quantum drive from Ace Astrogation delivers fined tuned performance at a reasonable price.
sparkfire.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：王牌航天 (Ace Astrogation)
尺寸：2 
等级：C
分类：竞赛

王牌航天的火花量子驱动器，价格公道，性能优越。

spectre.name: Spectre
spectre.description: The Spectre can't make your ship invisible, but it comes close. Expertly crafted by RAMP, this quantum drive disperses heat and hides IR and EM signatures to make it a great small component for those that want to go unnoticed.
spectre.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：RAMP公司
尺寸：1 
等级：A
分类：隐形

幽魂不能使您的飞船消失，但它快要消失了。该量子驱动器由RAMP精心制作，可以散发热量并隐藏红外和电磁信号，对于想要存低调的人来说是很棒的小组件。

spicule.name: Spicule
spicule.description: Here one second and gone the next. That's what you'll get with the Spicule quantum drive, which RAMP engineered to keep the component's emission signature as low as possible.
spicule.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：RAMP公司
尺寸：2 
等级：A
分类：隐形

只待一秒，然后下一个。使用刺针量子驱动器，就能得到RAMP公司设计的散发信号尽可能低的量子驱动器组件。

sunfire.name: SunFire
sunfire.description: Great performance and elegant design makes the Ace Astrogation SunFire quantum drive a favorite among race fans and enthusiasts.
sunfire.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：王牌航天 (Ace Astrogation)
尺寸：2 
等级：B
分类：竞赛

出色的性能和优雅的设计使王牌航天火花量子驱动器成为赛车迷和发烧友的最爱。

torrent.name: Torrent
torrent.description: Whatever destination you choose, the ArcCorp Torrent quantum drive is a solid choice to help get you there direct and hassle-free.
torrent.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：弧光集团 (ArcCorp)
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：民用

无论您的目的地在何方，弧光集团的"激流"量子驱动器都是您最可靠的选择，能帮助您直达目的地。

ts-2.name: TS-2
ts-2.description: Advanced protective plating provides the TS-2 with superior durability and protection against the elements and aggressors, making it an ideal quantum drive for those moments when danger calls.
ts-2.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：未科技
尺寸：3
等级：A
分类：军用

先进的镀层为 TS-2提供了超强的耐用性和应对环境及攻击的保护，使它成为一个危急时刻理想的量子驱动器。

tyche.name: Tyche
tyche.description: The Tyche quantum drive harmoniously balances performance, durability, and stealth to create a well-rounded component capable of adeptly handling a variety of situations.
tyche.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：RSI
尺寸：3
等级：B
分类：民用

命运女神量子驱动器，一款平衡了性能，耐用性和隐蔽性的全能之作 让你足以应对各种情况.

vesta.name: Vesta
vesta.description: Ensure your goods get to where they need to go with the Vesta quantum drive. Juno Starwerk specifically designed the component to handle all the trials and tribulations of the long haul.
vesta.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：3
等级：D
分类：工业

用维斯塔量子驱动器来确保你的货物到达它们该去的地方.朱诺星际工厂特别设计了此部件来应对长途运输中的考验与磨难。

vk-00.name: VK-00
vk-00.description: When the stakes are high, Wei-Tek's advanced VK-00 quantum drive is the only choice you should trust to get you where you need to be.
vk-00.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：未科技
尺寸：1
等级：A
分类：军用

当面临巨大风险时，未科技先进的VK-00量子驱动器是您能够信任的唯一选择，它能支援您到达任何您要去的地方。

voyage.name: Voyage
voyage.description: Crafted by passionate people who have been leading the way in space exploration and travel for over six centuries, the Voyage by Tarsus is a quantum drive worthy of your next expedition.
voyage.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：塔苏斯 (Tarsus)
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：民用

塔苏斯的“航程”是一群充满激情的人们精心打造的量子驱动器，他们已经在太空探索和旅行领域引领了六个多世纪的潮流，这款设备是你下一次探险时的最好选择。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

vulcan.name: Vulcan
vulcan.description: Juno Starwerk designed the Vulcan to be both cost efficient and durable. It won't win any awards for its performance but can be trusted to get you to your destination.
vulcan.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：1
等级：D
分类：工业

朱诺星际工厂出品的火神量子引擎既皮实耐用还经济。它的性能中规中矩但可靠，就是为你的出行平安。

wanderer.name: Wanderer
wanderer.description: Tarsus carefully designed and tuned the Wanderer into an all-around solid quantum drive, making it one of the more popular components in their revered line-up.
wanderer.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：塔苏斯（Tarsus）
尺寸：3
等级：C
分类：民用

塔苏斯将漫游者精心设计并调校成一个全能的固态量子驱动器，使其成为塔苏斯产品线最受欢迎的产品之一。

wayfare.name: Wayfare
wayfare.description: Speed through space without breaking the bank. The Warfare is a small quantum drive from Tarsus that was specifically designed to help make space travel affordable for the masses.
wayfare.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：塔苏斯(Tarsus)
尺寸：1
等级：D
分类：民用

无需榨干抹净您的钱包就可以到享受快速的星际旅行。旅行是一款由塔苏斯生产小型量子驱动器，提供经济实惠的星际旅行。

xl-1.name: XL-1
xl-1.description: Wei-Tek might be a new company, but their line of military-grade components is already gaining notoriety. The XL-1 is their premier medium quantum drive that expertly blends performance and durability.
xl-1.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：未科技
尺寸：2
等级：A
分类：军用

虽然未科技是一家新公司，但他们的军用级组件系列已久负盛名。XL-1是未科技首屈一指的中型量子驱动器，拥有优异的性能和耐用性。

yaluk.name: Yaluk
yaluk.description: The bigger the haul, the harder your quantum drive has to work. With Juno Starwerk's Yaluk onboard, you'll know that you have a quantum drive that is up to the challenge of getting the job done.
yaluk.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：朱诺星际工厂 (Juno Starwerk)
尺寸：2
等级：D
分类：工业

货船的运量越大，您量子驱动器的任务也就越艰巨。搭载朱诺星际工厂的"亚鲁克"，你便能深刻体会到一个优秀的量子驱动器是如何高效率完成任务的挑战。

yeager.name: Yeager
yeager.description: Whether you're rushing to the rescue or simply patrolling through a sector, the Yeager quantum drive from Wei-Tek allows for greater performance when you need it most.
yeager.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：未科技
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：军用

无论您是急于进行救援还是在某个部门巡逻，未科技的"猎人"量子驱动器都能在您最需要的时候提供更高的性能。

zephyr.name: Zephyr
zephyr.description: By minimizing emissions through an advanced reduced outflow filtration process, the RAMP Zephyr quantum drive helps ensure privacy while traveling wherever you go.
zephyr.description_zh:
物品类型：量子驱动器
制造商：RAMP公司
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：隐形

凭借先进的辐射过滤系统，RAMP公司生产的"和风"量子驱动器得以将辐射量降至最低，以此确保您在任何地方旅行时的私密性。

purchase.terminal_name: Ship Weapons - Cousin Crow's - Providence Platform - Orison

abetti.name: Abetti
abetti.description: Supplying high powered detection technology, the Abetti's advanced systems offer a responsive radar experience.
abetti.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：威尔士Op（WillsOp）
尺寸：1
等级：A
分类：民用

阿贝提的先进系统提供高功率探测技术，为您带来反应灵敏的雷达体验。

agrippa.name: Agrippa
agrippa.description: A superior quality radar able to accurate provide information on your vehicle's surroundings.
agrippa.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：威尔士Op（WillsOp）
尺寸：2
等级：A
分类：民用

一款高品质雷达，能够准确提供您载具周围环境的信息。

agure.name: Agure
agure.description: Trusted by many security firms for their vehicles, this reliable and consistent radar will keep your operation on track.
agure.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：新范式集团（Groupe Nouveau Paradigme）
尺寸：0
等级：D
分类：军用

许多安保公司都在他们的载具上放心使用这款雷达，其可靠且稳定的性能将确保你的行动顺利进行。

anysta.name: Anysta
anysta.description: Avoid getting tunnel vision with the Anysta radar. Offering exceptional performance all round, this radar will help keep you informed.
anysta.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：威尔士Op（WillsOp）
尺寸：3
等级：A
分类：民用

使用安内斯塔 雷达，避免陷入狭隘视野。这款雷达提供全方位的卓越性能，将帮助您随时掌握周边动态。

backlund.name: Backlund
backlund.description: Wherever you fly, the WillsOp Backlund radar is perfect for gathering information on what's nearby and detecting a variety of emission signatures.
backlund.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：威尔士Op
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：民用

无论您在何处航行，威尔士Op的"巴克伦"雷达都是你收集附近物体信息并检测各种信号特征的理想选择。

battani.name: Battani
battani.description: Expand your horizons with the WilsOp Battani radar and its advanced passive detection system.
battani.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：威尔士Op
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：民用

威尔士Op的"巴塔尼"雷达以其先进的被动检测系统扩展了您的视野。

broadspec.name: BroadSpec
broadspec.description: The Chimera Communications BroadSpec radar has an important job to do and does it well, detecting a wide range of emissions and signatures with a dependability you can count on.
broadspec.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：奇美拉通讯 (Chimera Communications)
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：工业

奇美拉通讯的"泛用规格"雷达具有出色的性能，可以很好地检测各种辐射和信号，您可以放心大胆地使用它。

broadspec-2.name: BroadSpec
broadspec-2.description: The Chimera Communications BroadSpec radar has an important job to do and does it well, detecting a wide range of emissions and signatures with a dependability you can count on.
broadspec-2.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：奇美拉通讯 (Chimera Communications)
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：工业

奇美拉通讯的"泛用规格"雷达具有出色的性能，可以很好地检测各种辐射和信号，您可以放心大胆地使用它。

broadspec-go.name: BroadSpec-Go
broadspec-go.description: The BroadSpec-Go was designed with accuracy, reliability, and durability in mind. And that's exactly what this radar provides.
broadspec-go.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：奇美拉通讯
尺寸：0
等级：B
分类：工业

泛用规格Go以精确、可靠和耐用为理念设计，这也正是这款雷达所提供的。

broadspec-max.name: BroadSpec-Max
broadspec-max.description: Keep your eyes on the prize with the BroadSpec-Max. Suitable for the largest of ships, this radar performs effectively without compromise.
broadspec-max.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：奇美拉通讯
尺寸：4
等级：B
分类：工业

用泛用规格Max盯紧目标。适用于最大的飞船，这款雷达运行高效，毫不妥协。

capston.name: Capston
capston.description: Experience why WillsOp is a premiere manufacturer of ship electronics with their Capston radar. Outfit your ship with one today so you know what's nearby.
capston.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：威尔士Op
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：民用

通过体验威尔士Op的"卡普斯顿"雷达，你会知道他们为何能成为飞船电子系统领域的首要制造商。今天就为您的飞船配备这款雷达，让您体验将一切尽收眼底的感觉。

capsulo.name: Capsulo
capsulo.description: For a dependable radar with above average performance, the Capsulo is a trustworthy option.
capsulo.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：威尔士Op（WillsOp）
尺寸：3
等级：B
分类：民用

如果您需要一款性能高于平均水平且可靠的雷达，卡普苏洛是一个值得信赖的选择。

cassandra.name: Cassandra
cassandra.description: When staying undetected is the key to operational security, the Cassandra radar features reduced emissions while still providing above average performance.
cassandra.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：蓝三角公司（Blue Triangle Inc.）
尺寸：2
等级：A
分类：隐形

当保持不被探测到是行动安全的关键时，卡珊德拉 雷达具有减少辐射的特点，同时仍能够提供高于平均的性能。

chernykh.name: Chernykh
chernykh.description: The Chernykh is named after the famed 26th century engineer who designed some of the most prized radars of that era. This medium radar from WillsOp celebrates both the look and performance of those classic components.
chernykh.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：威尔士Op
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：民用

"切尔尼克"以26世纪著名工程师的名字命名，他设计了那个时代一些最珍贵的雷达。这是威尔士Op的一款中型雷达，既致敬了经典设备的外观又兼具了性能。

denning.name: Denning
denning.description: With the Denning, you can now equip an award winning WillsOp radar to your vehicle.
denning.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：威尔士Op
尺寸：0
等级：C
分类：民用

现如今，您可以为您的载具配备威尔士Op屡获殊荣的"丹宁"雷达。

devoue.name: Devoue
devoue.description: The Devoue radar is able to render nearby energy emissions accurately and quickly, allowing you to retain control even in the most dire situations.
devoue.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：新范式集团（Groupe Nouveau Paradigme）
尺寸：3
等级：B
分类：军用

奉献 雷达能够准确、快速地呈现附近的能量信号，让您即使在最危急的情况下也能保持掌控。

ecouter.name: Ecouter
ecouter.description: Space is vast and unknowable, that's why discerning pilots rely on the Ecouter small radar from GNP to keep them in the know about what's around them.
ecouter.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：新范式集团 (GNP)
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：军用

宇宙空间是巨大且神秘的，这就是为什么有眼光的飞行员依靠新范式集团的"聆听"小型雷达来帮助他们了解周围的事物的原因。

ecouter-2.name: Ecouter
ecouter-2.description: Space is vast and unknowable, that's why discerning pilots rely on the Ecouter small radar from GNP to keep them in the know about what's around them.
ecouter-2.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：新范式集团 (GNP)
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：军用

宇宙空间是巨大且神秘的，这就是为什么有眼光的飞行员依靠新范式集团的"聆听"小型雷达来帮助他们了解周围的事物的原因。

epier.name: Epier
epier.description: GNP's finely tuned Epier medium radar delivers military grade stats for advanced signature detection wherever your mission takes you.
epier.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：新范式集团 (GNP)
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：军用

新范式集团的"显现"中型雷达可提供军用级别的数据统计能力，可在任何您执行任务的地方为您提供先进的信号检测。

fabian.name: Fabian
fabian.description: Utilizing best-in-class scanning technology, the Fabian radar ensures you won't be caught unaware.
fabian.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：威尔士Op（WillsOp）
尺寸：0
等级：A
分类：民用

法比安 雷达采用同类最佳的扫描技术，确保您不会措手不及。

fawad.name: Fawad
fawad.description: The Fawad entry-level radar from WillsOp is the perfect choice for someone who is looking for a no-frills signature detection system perfect for everyday use.
fawad.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：威尔士Op
尺寸：2
等级：D
分类：民用

威尔士Op的"法瓦德"入门级雷达是那些喜欢简单朴素适合日常使用的雷达系统的人的理想选择。

fidele.name: Fidele
fidele.description: Focusing on the core features of a radar, the Fidele operates efficiently even in battle conditions.
fidele.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：新范式集团（Groupe Nouveau Paradigme）
尺寸：3
等级：D
分类：军用

忠信专注于雷达的核心功能，即使在战斗条件下也能高效运行。

fleming.name: Fleming
fleming.description: The Fleming is WillsOp's base small radar. What it lacks in bells and whistles, it makes up for with consistent performance.
fleming.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：威尔士Op
尺寸：1
等级：D
分类：民用

"弗莱明"是威尔士Op的基础型小型雷达，它没有任何花哨的东西，完全专注于稳定的性能。

fullspec.name: FullSpec
fullspec.description: The FullSpec radar is considered by many to be one of the most dependable radar systems you can equip your rig with on the market today. Chimera Communications has worked hard to reduce false positives while improving consistency over range and the results speak for themselves.
fullspec.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：奇美拉通讯 (Chimera Communications)
尺寸：2
等级：A
分类：工业

"全装规格"雷达被认为是当今市场上最可靠的雷达系统之一。奇美拉通信公司一直在努力减少误报概率，同时提高了扫描范围内的稳定性，其结果不言自明。

fullspec-go.name: FullSpec-Go
fullspec-go.description: Chimera Communications knows that for a high quality radar, consistency is key. The FullSpec-Go, specifically designed to offer clarity in the most hazardous of terrain, guarantees you'll get where you need to go without any surprises.
fullspec-go.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：奇美拉通讯
尺寸：0
等级：A
分类：工业

奇美拉通讯深知，持续性是高品质雷达必备的。全装规格Go专门设计用于在最危险的地形提供清晰视野，保证你没有任何意外的到达目的地。

fullspec-max.name: FullSpec-Max
fullspec-max.description: Keep your targets in your sights with the FullSpec-Max radar featuring advanced hard-working systems that excel at identifying potential threats.
fullspec-max.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：奇美拉通讯
尺寸：3
等级：A
分类：工业

用全装规格Max把目标锁定在视野内，它配备先进且高效的系统，擅长识别潜在的威胁。

hunter.name: Hunter
hunter.description: When a low signature is of the utmost importance, the Hunter stealth radar will keep you aware of what's around without getting you found.
hunter.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：蓝三角公司
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：隐形

当隐秘的行动至关重要时，"猎手"隐形雷达能帮助你在不被人发现的情况下对周围的一切了如指掌。

mauler-radar.name: Mauler Radar
mauler-radar.description: The Radar system for the Vanduul Mauler allowing it to detect objects large and small for navigational and combat data.
mauler-radar.description_zh: 剜度 重拳的雷达系统，可探测大小物体，为导航和作战提供数据。

observer.name: Observer
observer.description: Using formerly classified military technology, this now publically available radar is designed to offer key information to the user.
observer.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：奇美拉通讯（Chimera Communications）
尺寸：2
等级：D
分类：工业

使用曾经保密的军用科技打造，这款现已公开发售的雷达设计用于为用户提供关键信息。

observer-go.name: Observer-Go
observer-go.description: Designed to be as accessible as possible, the Observer-Go is a strong entry-level radar for those that want to keep themselves informed without breaking the bank.
observer-go.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：奇美拉通讯
尺寸：1
等级：D
分类：工业

观察者Go的设计尽可能易于使用，对于那些想要保持信息灵通而又不想破费到破产的人来说，这是一款强大的入门级雷达。

observer-lite.name: Observer-Lite
observer-lite.description: The Observer-Lite is a no-frills radar ready for those long hauls. Trust the brand that focuses on how good a radar works and not just how it looks.
observer-lite.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：奇美拉通讯 (Chimera Communications)
尺寸：1
等级：D
分类：工业

"观察者Lite"是一款相对简单的雷达，适合长途飞行时使用。你要信任那些只关注雷达如何工作，而不只是它看起来如何的品牌。

observer-max.name: Observer-Max
observer-max.description: Dependable and built to last, the Observer-Max offers standard radar detection.
observer-max.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：奇美拉通讯
尺寸：3
等级：D
分类：工业

可靠，经久耐用，观察者Max提供了标准的雷达探测性能。

pelerous.name: Pelerous
pelerous.description: Aggressors can't attack what they can't see, so keep your signature low with the Pelorous stealth radar from Blue Triangle Inc.
pelerous.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：蓝三角公司 (Blue Triangle Inc.)
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：隐形

再强大的攻击者都无法攻击他们看不到的东西，因此使用蓝三角股份有限公司的"方位盘"隐形雷达将您的信号保持在较低水平能使您在战斗中占尽先机。

predator.name: Predator
predator.description: Created for those that want to keep a low profile, the Predator radar operates with low electromagnetic emissions, to help reduce your signature.
predator.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：蓝三角公司（Blue Triangle Inc.）
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：隐形

为那些想要保持低调的人打造，掠食者 雷达以低电磁辐射运行，以帮助减少你的信号。

prevenir.name: Prevenir
prevenir.description: The Prevenir has been refined by extensive military field testing, making it the go-to vehicle radar for many across the UEE.
prevenir.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：新范式集团 (GNP)
尺寸：0
等级：C
分类：军用

"戒备"在经过广泛的军事测试后得到完善，使其成为UEE境内许多人的首选雷达。

prophet.name: Prophet
prophet.description: The art of seeing without being seen has never been better exemplified than by the Prophet radar system. Blue Triangle Inc. has managed to maximize sensitivity while minimizing pulse emissions to create a radar ideal for remaining off other people's.
prophet.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：蓝三角公司 (Blue Triangle Inc.)
尺寸：1
等级：A
分类：隐形

没有什么能比“预言家"雷达系统更能体现"你能发现别人，而别人发现不了你"这句话的含义了。蓝三角股份有限公司设法在最大程度地提高扫描灵敏度的同时将脉冲信号降至最低，从而打造出这款优秀的雷达，可以帮你与他人之间一直保持安全的距离。

resolu.name: Resolu
resolu.description: Invented with larger ships in mind, the Resolu radar provides the same level of three-dimensional scanning technology without sacrificing dependability.
resolu.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：新范式集团（Groupe Nouveau Paradigme）
尺寸：3
等级：C
分类：军用

专为大型飞船研发，决断 雷达在不牺牲可靠性的前提下，提供了同等水平的三维扫描技术。

savoir.name: Savoir
savoir.description: Boasting a decent range and energy efficiency, the Savoir is a radar designed for those that favor reliability.
savoir.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：新范式集团（Groupe Nouveau Paradigme）
尺寸：2
等级：D
分类：军用

洞察 雷达拥有相当不错的探测范围和能源效率，专为那些看重可靠性的人而设计。

sens.name: Sens
sens.description: The cutting-edge GNP Sens design elevates radar technology to meet or exceed the specifications used by most military organizations operating today.
sens.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：新范式集团 (GNP)
尺寸：0
等级：B
分类：军用

 新范式集团在"感知"上采用的先进设计大大提高了该款雷达的工作能力，使其达到甚至超过了当今大多数军事组织正在使用的设备水平。

snsr5.name: SNSR5
snsr5.description: The SNSR5 radar small size and dependable performance makes it the perfect device for entry-level users.
snsr5.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：领航-E7 工具（Nav-E7 Gadgets）
尺寸：1
等级：D
分类：竞赛

SNSR5 雷达体积小巧且性能可靠，使其成为入门级用户的完美设备。

sns-r5x.name: SNS-R5x
sns-r5x.description: Perfect for an entry-level pilot, the SNS-R5x trades excessive frills for energy efficiency.
sns-r5x.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：领航-E7 工具（Nav-E7 Gadgets）
尺寸：2
等级：D
分类：竞赛

SNS-R5x 非常适合入门级飞行员，它舍弃了多余的繁杂功能以换取更高的能源效率。

sns-r6.name: SNS-R6
sns-r6.description: Increased power and performance makes the SNS-R6 stand out from other radars in its class. Get yours today to see why pilots the Empire over love components from Nav-E7 Gadgets.
sns-r6.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：领航E7工具 (Nav-E7)
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：竞赛

增强的功率和性能使SNS-R6在同类雷达中脱颖而出。今天就来领略一下为什么帝国的飞行员如此喜爱领航E7工具的组件吧。

sns-r6x.name: SNS-R6x
sns-r6x.description: The SNS-R6x provides certainty when detecting electromagnetic emissions, as well as offering reasonable levels of energy efficiency.
sns-r6x.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：领航-E7 工具（Nav-E7 Gadgets）
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：竞赛

The SNS-R6x为探测电磁辐射提供了准确性保证，同时也提供合理的能效水平。

snsr7.name: SNSR7
snsr7.description: Engineered to give your vehicle the edge, the SNSR7 provides real-time tracking information on all surrounding emissions.
snsr7.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：领航-E7 工具（Nav-E7 Gadgets）
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：竞赛

SNSR7 旨在为您的载具提供优势，它能提供周围所有辐射源的实时跟踪信息。

sns-r7x.name: SNS-R7x
sns-r7x.description: Favoring energy efficiency above all, the SNS-R7x is a radar is ideal for those looking to manage their ship's levels effectively, whilst still providing excellent vision.
sns-r7x.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：领航-E7 工具（Nav-E7 Gadgets）
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：竞赛

SNS-R7x 雷达将能源效率置于首位，非常适合那些希望有效管理飞船能耗水平，同时仍需提供出色视野的用户。

socoria.name: Socoria
socoria.description: The Socoria is a well-rounded radar providing everything a pilot needs for an effective radar at a reasonable price point.
socoria.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：威尔士Op（WillsOp）
尺寸：3
等级：D
分类：民用

索科利亚 是一款性能全面的雷达，以合理的价格为飞行员提供高效雷达所需的一切。

spyglass.name: Spyglass
spyglass.description: Designed to help you remain undetected by hostile parties, the Spyglass radar operates with lower emissions while still giving you the full picture.
spyglass.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：蓝三角公司（Blue Triangle Inc.）
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：隐形

为了帮你不被敌对势力发现而设计，窥镜 雷达在以低电磁辐射运行的同时仍能助你看清全景。

surveyor.name: Surveyor
surveyor.description: The Surveyor radar from Chimera Communications does away with all the unnecessary extras other manufacturers hide behind to focus on what matters: signature and emission detection that works the way you need it to.
surveyor.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：奇美拉通讯 (Chimera Communications)
尺寸：2
等级：C
分类：工业

奇美拉通讯的勘测者 雷达去除了其他制造商安装在他们生产的设备中普遍存在的很多不必要的附属物，专注于对雷达来说最重要的事项：确保信号和辐射检测能按您需要的方式工作。

surveyor-go.name: Surveyor-Go
surveyor-go.description: The SurveyorGo is a vehicle-sized version of Chimera Communications' popular line of radars.
surveyor-go.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：奇美拉通讯 (Chimera Communications)
尺寸：0
等级：C
分类：工业

勘测者-Go是奇美拉通讯热门雷达产品线的地面载具版本。

surveyor-lite.name: Surveyor-Lite
surveyor-lite.description: There's a lot for you to worry about on those long hauls. Don't let your radar's performance be one of them. You can count on the Surveyor-Lite from Chimera Communications to provide the durability and performance that you need.
surveyor-lite.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：奇美拉通讯 (Chimera Communications)
尺寸：1
等级：C
分类：工业

在你进行长途运输时，您会遇到很多阻碍，不要让雷达的性能成为其中之一，对此您可以完全信赖奇美拉通讯勘测者-Lite的耐用性和性能。

surveyor-max.name: Surveyor-Max
surveyor-max.description: The Surveyor-Max radar system is designed to effectively identify nearby objects so that you can stay focused on what matters.
surveyor-max.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：奇美拉通讯（Chimera Communications）
尺寸：3
等级：C
分类：工业

勘测者-Max雷达系统设计用于有效识别附近目标，让你可以专注于重要之物。

tige.name: Tige
tige.description: Situational awareness is key when engaging with hostiles. The GNP developed the Tige radar with improved accuracy to helps ensure that any viable contacts are detected.
tige.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：新范式集团 (GNP)
尺寸：1
等级：B
分类：军用

与敌方交战时，对周边情况的感知至关重要。新范式集团开发的"遏制"雷达精度更高，有助于检测到任何有用的信息。

v60-26.name: V60-26
v60-26.description: Providing crucial information during your operation, the V60-26 radar offers highly accurate and detailed updates on nearby emissions.
v60-26.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：新范式集团（Groupe Nouveau Paradigme）
尺寸：0
等级：A
分类：军用

在你的行动中提供关键信息，V60-26雷达对附近的辐射信号提供高精度和详细的更新。

v801-11.name: V801-11
v801-11.description: Designed for the battlefield, the V801-11 is a cut above the rest thanks to the rigid, iterative testing, guaranteeing its performance when you need it most.
v801-11.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：新范式集团（Groupe Nouveau Paradigme）
尺寸：1
等级：A
分类：军用

专为战场设计，V801-11 凭借严格的迭代测试出类拔萃，确保在您最需要时发挥其优异性能。

v801-12.name: V801-12
v801-12.description: During field operations, the GNP V801-12 radar system allows for increased strategic planning owing to its capability for detecting a wide variety of emission signatures, revealing hazards and hostiles alike.
v801-12.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：新范式集团 (GNP)
尺寸：2
等级：A
分类：军用

在野外作业期间，由于新范式集团"V801-12"雷达系统具有检测各种信号，揭示风险和敌对目标的能力，因此可以用来协助进行战略规划。

v880.name: V880
v880.description: Providing useful assistance when detecting hostiles, the V880 brings the power of military technology to the consumer market.
v880.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：新范式集团（Groupe Nouveau Paradigme）
尺寸：3
等级：A
分类：军用

V880 在探测敌对目标时能提供有效的协助，它将军事科技的力量带入了消费市场。

vigilance.name: Vigilance
vigilance.description: Vigilance means keeping a careful watch for any possible dangerous threats and the GNP radar that bears this name allows you to do just that with its proprietary emission accrual.
vigilance.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：新范式集团 (GNP)
尺寸：2
等级：B
分类：军用

“警惕”意味着要仔细观察任何潜在的威胁，应用了这个名称的这款新范式集团的雷达使您能够通过其专业的信号检测能力做到这一点。

vogel.name: Vogel
vogel.description: As you ride to destinations new and afar, uncover the unknown with the Vogel radar from WillsOp that features innovative signature filtration and detection algorithms.
vogel.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：威尔士Op
尺寸：0
等级：B
分类：民用

在您前往新的目的地之前，请先使用威尔士Op的"沃格尔"雷达防患于未然，该雷达具有革命性的信号过滤技术和检测算法。

voir.name: Voir
voir.description: The Voir is not just for the military anymore. Now you too can attach this small radar to your ship to stay safe.
voir.description_zh:
物品类型：雷达
制造商：新范式集团 (GNP)
尺寸：1
等级：D
分类：军用

"真相"不再是军队的专属，现在您也可以将这款小型雷达安装到您的船上以确保安全。

arbor-mh1-mining-laser-2.name: Arbor MH1 Mining Laser
arbor-mh1-mining-laser-2.description: The Arbor MH1 became the universe's most heralded mining laser thanks to Greycat Industrial's exacting standards and business prowess. The laser found favor among industrial and solo operations for balancing speed and safety while also featuring a special filtration system that reduces the amount of inert material collected. Greycat capitalized on this reputation by securing exclusive contracts that made the Arbor MH1 the standard laser head on most mining ships.
arbor-mh1-mining-laser-2.description_zh:
制造商：灰猫工业 (Greycat Industrial)
物品类型：采矿激光
尺寸：1

最佳距离：60米
最大距离：180米

采矿激光功率：189 - 1890
提取激光功率：1850

模组插槽：1

激光不稳定性：-35%
充能绿区范围：+40%
惰性物质含量：-30%

开采抗性：+25%

得益于灰猫工业的严格标准和商业实力，刀轴MH1成为世界上最受欢迎的采矿激光器。该激光器因其平衡速度和安全性受到了众多企业和个人的青睐。与此同时，它还配备有特殊的过滤系统，可以减少惰性物质的收集量。灰猫利用它的声誉获得了独家合约，使刀轴MH1成为大多数采矿船上的原装激光器。

arbor-mh1-mining-laser-3.name: Arbor MH1 Mining Laser
arbor-mh1-mining-laser-3.description: The Arbor MH1 became the universe's most heralded mining laser thanks to Greycat Industrial's exacting standards and business prowess. The laser found favor among industrial and solo operations for balancing speed and safety while also featuring a special filtration system that reduces the amount of inert material collected. Greycat capitalized on this reputation by securing exclusive contracts that made the Arbor MH1 the standard laser head on most mining ships.

arbor-mh2-mining-laser.name: Arbor MH2 Mining Laser
arbor-mh2-mining-laser.description: The Arbor MH2 is the size two version of Greycat's heralded Arbor mining laser series. Like the smaller variant, the Arbor MH2's solid, reliable design found favor among industrial and solo operations for balancing speed and safety while also featuring a special filtration system that reduces the amount of inert material collected.
arbor-mh2-mining-laser.description_zh:
制造商：灰猫工业 (Greycat Industrial)
物品类型：采矿激光
尺寸：2

最佳距离：90米
最大距离：270米

采矿激光功率：480 - 2400
提取激光功率：2590

模组插槽：2

激光不稳定性：-35%
充能绿区范围：+40%
惰性物质含量：-40%

开采抗性：+25%

刀轴MH2是灰猫著名的“刀轴”采矿激光系列的S2版本。与较小的变体一样，刀轴MH2因其平衡速度和安全性，以及可以减少对惰性物质收集的特殊过滤系统等坚固可靠的设计而被企业和个人所青睐。

arbor-mhv-mining-laser.name: Arbor MHV Mining Laser
arbor-mhv-mining-laser.description: The Arbor has became the universe's most heralded mining laser thanks to Greycat Industrial's exacting standards and business prowess. The MHV takes that same classic design and reimagines it for a more compact mining-rig while still delivering the solid and reliable performance that miners have come to rely on.
arbor-mhv-mining-laser.description_zh:
制造商：灰猫工业 (Greycat Industrial)
物品类型：采矿激光
尺寸：0

最佳使用距离：15米
最大使用距离：20米
采集效率：0.01 SCU/s
采集点半径：1米

由于灰猫工业所制定严格的标准及其强大的商业实力，“刀轴”已经成为全宇宙最具影响力的采矿激光设备。MHV沿用了经典的外观设计，并将其重新改进为更紧凑型的采矿设备，足以为广大星际矿工们提供坚实可靠的性能。

purchase.terminal_name: Tammany and Sons - Metro Center - Lorville

helix-ii-mining-laser.name: Helix II Mining Laser
helix-ii-mining-laser.description: To some, the effective use of the Helix II has become a sign of a true mining professional. Thermyte Concern gave the laser impressive power that can bypass a deposit's resistance but also requires precision handling to hit the optimal charge window. Best deployed at close range, Helix II features three module slots so miners can tailor the laser to their liking.
helix-ii-mining-laser.description_zh:
制造商：铝热公司
物品类型：采矿激光
尺寸：2

最佳距离：30米
最大距离：90米

采矿激光功率：1020 - 4080
提取激光功率：2590

模组插槽：3

开采抗性：-30%
惰性物质含量：-40%

充能绿区范围：-40%

对一些人来说，能有效使用螺旋II已经成为一名真正采矿专业人士的标志。铝热公司为其提供了超强的功率，可以无视矿石的开采抗性，但需要精确的操控才能稳定在充能绿区范围内。螺旋II最适合近距离采矿，具有两个模组插槽供矿工根据自己的喜好来安装模组。

purchase.terminal_name: Tammany and Sons - Metro Center - Lorville

helix-i-mining-laser.name: Helix I Mining Laser
helix-i-mining-laser.description: To some, the effective use of the Helix I has become a sign of a true mining professional. Best deployed at close range, Helix I features two module slots so miners can tailor the laser to their liking.

purchase.terminal_name: Tammany and Sons - Metro Center - Lorville

hofstede-s1-mining-laser.name: Hofstede-S1 Mining Laser
hofstede-s1-mining-laser.description: The Hofstede-S1 was designed with a patented crystal lattice structure that dampens a deposit's natural resistance while mining and gathers less inert materials when extracting. Most effective at short and medium range, an accompanying increase in instability means the laser should be managed carefully.
hofstede-s1-mining-laser.description_zh:
制造商：舒宾星际 (Shubin Interstellar)
物品类型：采矿激光
尺寸：1

最佳距离：45米
最大距离：135米

采矿激光功率：105 - 2100
提取激光功率：1295

模组插槽：1

开采抗性：-30%
充能绿区充能速率：+20%
惰性物质含量：-30%

激光不稳定性：+10%

霍夫斯塔德-S1采用专利晶格结构，可在采矿时降低抗性，并减少对惰性物质的提取。在近距离和中距离效果最佳，但激光的不稳定性会提高，所以在使用时需谨慎控制。

purchase.terminal_name: Tammany and Sons - Metro Center - Lorville

hofstede-s1-mining-laser.name_zh: 霍夫斯泰德-S1 采矿激光器

impact-ii-mining-laser-3.name: Impact II Mining Laser
impact-ii-mining-laser-3.description: The Impact II excels in a variety of mining situations. Special focus lenses make it easier to work a deposit by stabilizing the laser and increasing the optimal charge window. There are drawbacks, including increased deposit resistance and a slower filling optimal charge window, but Thermyte Concern also provided three module slots to allow miners to better customize the laser to the task at hand.
impact-ii-mining-laser-3.description_zh:
制造商：铝热公司
物品类型：采矿激光
尺寸：2

最佳距离：60米
最大距离：180米

采矿激光功率：840 - 3360
提取激光功率：3145

模组插槽：3

激光不稳定性：-10%
充能绿区范围：+20%
惰性物质含量：-40%

开采抗性：+10%
充能绿区充能速率：-40%

冲击II在各种情况下都能有出色的表现。 特殊的聚焦透镜通过稳定激光器和扩大绿区范围，使得采矿更加简单。但也有一些缺点，它会增加开采抗性并降低在绿区的充能速率，但铝热公司为它提供了两个模组插槽，矿工可以安装模组以更好地开采矿石。

purchase.terminal_name: Tammany and Sons - Metro Center - Lorville

abrade-scraper-module.description: It's easy to see why the Abrade from Greycat Industrial is one of the most used scraper module in the 'verse. Its design delivers both a sizable area of effect and respectable extraction rate, creating a reliable beam that can scrape hulls quickly and efficiently.
